
1.1(1): klu'i snying bcos 'bum nag ces bya ba 
1.2(1): bzhugs pa'o/ /

1.4(1): na zhu tsha/ bod skad du/ klu'i snying bcos 'bum nag ces bya ba/ 'gro la phan gdag

1.6(1): phyag 'tshal lo/ /dang po ci yang med pa'i stong pa la/ srid pa las kyi skye 'phel las/
1.7(1): 'gro ba rnams kyi don ched du// phan gdag ston pa gshen srid pa/ dmu gshen 
1.8(1): gsal ba lha yi sras/ mi mngon dbyings nas 'od shar nas/ gshen phran 'bum 
1.9(1): dang bcas nas ni/ nam mkha'i khams nas dog la byon/ sprul pa'i sku ni bsam 
1.10(1): 'das kyang / ma nges 'khor dang bcas pa ni/ nam mkha'i khams su ye gshen 
1.11(1): dam la btags/ sa gzhi la gshegs pa'i dus su ri rab kyi rtse/ lha yul 'od ma'i 
1.12(1): gling la/ lha mthu rtsal can dam la btags pa'i dus na/ 'khor gyi dam pa gyur pa 
1.13(1): ni/ gnyan bon thang thang khrol ba dang / sa bdag gi bon po sdig rum sil ba dang /

2.1(1): btsug thal sbyar gus pa'i tshul phyung nas/ zhus pa'i mdo/ ston pa'i sgron ma gshen

2.3(1): yul ston pa mdzad du gsol/ sa ma dog la gshegs pa na/ sa bdag klu gnyan 
2.4(1): gtod dang gzed/ ma yams dal bdag gtum po yis/ ston pa nyid la bsdam 
2.5(1): par mchis/ sa la gnas pa'i sems can gyi/ mi gtsang dri mas gos par mchis/

19.19(1): don rtser chibs pa lnga thar pa'i bon du shes nas/ blang bya'i mtha' las 'das 
19.20(1): pa'o/ /yongs khyab tshad med pa bzhi thar pa'i bon du shes nas blang bya'i mtha' 
19.21(1): las 'das pa'o/ /thar pa'i bon la thar pa'i bon du shes na blang bya'i mtha' las 
20.1(1): 'das pa'o/ /klu las grub pa'i bon po ye shes snying po/ 'khor ba'i bon kun nas 
20.2(1): nyon mongs pa dang / rnam par byang ba'i bon thar pa thob pa gnyis yongs su bdag 
20.3(1): nyid la 'dus so/ /zhes gsungs te/ klu'i snying bcos 'bum nag gsungs pas/ klu 
20.4(1): gnyan las rtsa ba'i sdom tshig tu gsungs pa'i le'u ste dgu pa'o// //
20.5(1): 7 de'i tshe de'i dus na/ ston pas snying bcos 'bum nag gsungs pas/ klu 
20.6(1): gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde rnams kun/ sems la rtogs pa skyes nas 
20.7(1): ston pa'i spyan sngar sprin bzhin 'dus so/ /gshen rab kyi thugs rjes kun tshogs 
20.8(1): g.yung drung sems dpa' 'gyur/ nyon mongs ma rig gti mug shes mun 'dra ba 
20.9(1): sangs nas/ ye shes rig pa nyi ma shar ba 'dra ba 'char nas thar pa thob par 'gyur 
20.10(1): ro/ /ston pa'i thugs rje dang / gtsang ma klu'i snying 'bum bka' stsal pa'i byin 
20.11(1): rlabs kyis/ klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde rnams kyang / 'phral du 
20.12(1): bsod nams phun sum 'tshogs/ yun du bla med 'bras bu thob/ gdug sems nyon 
20.13(1): mongs zhi bas zhi ba'i sems dang ldan/ zhi bas sems can kun la skyobs/ 'jig 
20.14(1): rten khams kyi gshen rab dad pa can rnams dang / phyi rabs kyi sems can rnams 
20.15(1): dad pa skyes nas/ klu'i snying 'bum bris sam bka' bsgrag na/ klu gnyan gyi gdug 
20.16(1): pa zhi bar 'gyur ro/ /snying bcos 'bum nag snying bsdum na/ klu gnyan dang 'gras 
20.17(1): pa 'dum par 'gyur ro/ /klu nad gnyan nad sos nas kyang / dbang thang bsod 
20.18(1): nams rgyas par 'gyur/ sman 'bru lo 'bras legs par dang / bu tsha rigs rgyud 
20.19(1): 'phel bar 'gyur/ nor phyugs dar zhing rgyas par 'gyur/ shes rab dbang po 
20.20(1): gsal bar 'gyur/ yul phyogs chu shing lo tog kun/ smin nas dar zhing rgyas par 
20.21(1): 'gyur/ 'on dig dbang po ma tshang dang / zha grum mdze rigs rgyun chad nas/ yul 
21.1(1): khams gtsang zhing dag par 'gyur/ mthar yang legs pa kun 'byung zhing / tshogs 
21.2(1): kyi lam la tshogs rdzogs shing / sbyor ba'i lam la dbyings rtogs nas/ 'phral du 
21.3(1): bsod nams phun gsum tshogs/ yun du bde gnas thob par 'gyur/ klu yi snying 
21.4(1): 'bum 'di 'bri 'am/ klog gam/ 'chang ngam/ 'don nam/ bkur bsti rim gro 
21.5(1): byas nas 'dod pa phun sum 'tshogs par 'gyur/ g.yung drung theg pa chen po'i mdo 
21.6(1): las/ klu'i snying 'bum gyi spyi'i sdom tshig bstan pa'i le'u ste bcu pa'o// //
21.7(1): 7 de nas klu las grub pa'i bon po ye shes snying po la sogs te/ klu gnyan sa 
21.8(1): bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde/ 'khor tshogs 'bum tsho bye ba sa yas bskor ba'i 
21.9(1): rgyan dang cha lugs mdzes par byas nas/ mdzes pa'i me tog mang po ston pa'i sku 
21.10(1): la gtor nas/ pus btsug thal sbyar nas zhus pa/ mkhyen rab mnga' bdag sems 
21.11(1): can kun gyi yab/ 'gro don mthar phyin mi mchog skyes bu lags/ sngon srid pa'i rgyal 
21.12(1): bu thing ges yul bzung sa bcad/ phywa ye le khyab pas yul la skos btab pa'i dus 
21.13(1): na/ klu gnyan sa bdag dang 'gras pa dang / sangs dang sde rigs phan pa dang /
21.14(1): gnod pa dang / phan gnod med pa'i klu rigs dang / sde tshan dang / bon thams 
21.15(1): cad kyi gzhi dang rtsa ba dang / rgyu 'bras thams cad spang bya dang blang bya'i mtha' 
21.16(1): las 'das pa ngo mtshar che/ skye 'gro mi ru srid pa la/ lha mo dang / klu mo dang / sman 
21.17(1): mo dang / klu sman dang / 'brog mo dang / klu 'brog mo dang / bdud mo dang / klu 
21.18(1): bdud mo dang / klu btsan rnams lha ma srin sde brgyad dang bsdongs nas/ longs 
21.19(1): spyod la gnod pa dang / tshe la gnod pa dang / lus la zha ba rengs ba dang / sha 
21.20(1): nad dang khrag nad dang / rus nad du gyur pa 'di/ rgyu dang rkyen ci las gyur pa 
21.21(1): lags/ zhus pas/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ klu bon ye shes snying pos zhus 
22.1(1): sam gsol pa ni legs so/ /de'i nyes skyon ni 'di ltar ro/ /nya dang stong la sogs 
22.2(1): dus drug la/ drag po'i las rnams byed pa'i tshe/ ki kang lha srin 'gyu dus su/ dus 
22.3(1): tshod phyogs rnams ma bsrung bar/ drag po sngags kyi dam rdzas rnams/ nam mkha' 
22.4(1): gtad de 'phang pa yis/ nam mkha'i lha mo brgyad dang mkhon/ de yis nyes skyon 
22.5(1): gza' nad drag po 'beb pa dang / thog ser sgra mi snyan pa 'byung / bsnyen sgrub 
22.6(1): las rnams ma rdzogs par/ sa rdo chu mig gnyan po la/ gzir mnan drag po byas 
22.7(1): pa yis/ g.ya' spang sa rgod gnas pa yis/ klu mo brgyad dang mkhon pa'o/ /de'i 
22.8(1): nyes skyon ni/ sha bkra mdze shu g.yen pa 'byung / sa gnyan dmigs su ma shes pas/
22.9(1): sman gyi pho brang gnyan 'khyil la// dur gyi pho brang btab pa yis/ spang sman brgyad 
22.10(1): kyi thugs dang mkhon/ nyes skyon longs spyod dbang thang chung / mi rabs rmang 'dre 
22.11(1): byed par 'gyur/ mi gtsang rnam rtog ma chom par/ ri thang mtshams kyi sman mo rkang 
22.12(1): gcig rtsar/ thab gzhob mi gtsang nal byas pa/ klu sman brgyad kyi thugs dang mkhon/
22.13(1): de'i nyes skyon klu nad dmu sgangs mchin nad 'byung / rig pa'i sems dang mi ldan 
22.14(1): par/ sa gtsang yangs par mi gtsang byas pa yis/ ye 'drog brgyad dang de yis 
22.15(1): 'gras/ nyes skyon dreg dang grang bar byed/ chu mig 'dzag 'dzog rlan bag can/ bra 
22.16(1): ma spen ma 'dres pa'i shing / pha bong dreg can 'dren pa'i sar/ sha btsos khu ba phos 
22.17(1): pa yis/ klu 'brog ma mo brgyad dang 'khon/ nyes skyon lce nad mgul nad dang /
22.18(1): lkugs shing og nad can du 'gyur/ lu ma mgo dum ya nga'i sar/ bying rmug gnyid 
22.19(1): dang nal byas pas/ bdud mo 'khor bcas rnams dang mkhon/ nyes skyon smyo 'bog 
22.20(1): nad rnams 'byung / brag dang chu 'thab nya lcibs sar/ slang nas sems can srog 
22.21(1): la 'bag /klu bdud mo brgyad kyi thugs dang mkhon/ nyes skyon rkang lag zha rengs 
23.1(1): 'byung / chab nag sbrul 'khyug 'dra ba'i sar/ gong bcad sems can rkang lag 
23.2(1): bcad/ sa srin chen mo rnams dang 'gal/ nyes skyon chung srid dbang thang skam/
23.3(1): sa bdag gi pho brang gnyan par dur btab pas/ lha klu mthu rtsal can rnams la/
23.4(1): 'dams pa slong nas brkums pa yis/ klu srin rnams dang 'khon pa'o/ /nyes skyon 
23.5(1): longs spyod bsod nams chung / dbang thang chung zhing tshe la gzan/ gser nya g.yu 
23.6(1): nya rtags can dang / gser sbal g.yu sbal mtshan can dang / gser sbrul g.yu sbrul 
23.7(1): gyur pa dang / rin chen mdog 'dra'i sems can ni/ skam rlan ga na gnas na yang /
23.8(1): klu yi bkor nor yin pas su/ bzung nas ngan sems gtsos pa dang / sdig gam 
23.9(1): bsad na klu btsan rnams dang mkhon/ nyes skyon klu yi nad kyis zin/ klu yi mgo 
23.10(1): brnyan snyin nas gtsos pa dang / klu yi nad kyis gsod pa dang / klu yi sems can 
23.11(1): mthong na 'jigs par 'gyur ro/ /ngang pa dang / 'dar ba dang / rengs pa dang /
23.12(1): de ltar bar snang la gnas pa'i sems can la/ klu gnyan sa bdag gis dbang byas 
23.13(1): pa yod do/ /sa gzhi la gnas pa la/ sa bdag klu gnyan gyis dbang byas pa yod 
23.14(1): do/ /dbang byas pa'i sems can bzung ngam bsad na mi dge bar 'gyur ro/ /klu'i 
23.15(1): snying 'bum las/ sa bdag klu gnyan dang ci ltar/ 'gras pa'i le'u ste bcu gcig 
23.16(1): pa'o// //
23.17(1): 7 de nas klu bon la sogs 'khor rnams la/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa 
23.18(1): bdag klu gnyan gyi gnas tshul 'di ltar ste/ brag nag bya rog gdong pa 'dra ba la 
23.19(1): klu gnas so/ /dur phag nag po'i sna 'dra ba la klu gnas so/ /ba glang nyal ba 'dra 
23.20(1): ba la klu gnas so/ /rnga mo'i 'jing ldem 'dra ba la klu gnas so/ /'brong gi ru brag 
23.21(1): 'dra ba na klu gnas so/ /stag seng 'chong ba 'dra ba la klu gnas so/ /stag seng kha 
24.1(1): 'thab 'dra ba'i bar na klu gnas so/ /mchod rten 'dra ba'i sna la sa bdag gnas 
24.2(1): so/ /mi chen gral na bzhib pa 'dra ba'i dbyibs la sa gdon gnas so/ /sbrul nag 
24.3(1): thur du rgyug pa 'dra ba'i sa na klu gnas so/ /brag nag sbrul sbal na la gab pa 'dra 
24.4(1): ba na klu gnas so/ /nags dred mong 'khros pa 'dra ba'i ri la klu gnas so/ /dom 
24.5(1): nag thur du kyus pa 'dra ba'i ri la klu gnas so/ /shing sha ba brgyad pa'i rwa 'dra 
24.6(1): ba'i rked par klu gnas so/ /shing rkang gcig la gnyan gnas so/ /mdog so so na 
24.7(1): gnas gsal zhing phyi chu dang mtshe'u la klu gnas so/ /rgya mtsho la klu bdud mo gnas 
24.8(1): so/ /ba dmar glang dmar nyal ba 'dra ba na klu gnas so/ /brag shug dang / mtshe 
24.9(1): dang stag pa 'dra ba dang / be dang thang shing dang / shing rkang gcig dang / ri de 
24.10(1): bo/ /brag de bo/ gangs de bo/ chu mig mdog gsal ba la sa bdag gnas so/ /nya 
24.11(1): lcibs sngo dmar lding ba dang / ri dwags 'dab chags chu 'thung ba de mthong bas 
24.12(1): 'jigs pa de ni/ gyim za nyag gcig klu'i sde gnas so/ /brad pa'i sder rjes 'dra ba 
24.13(1): 'am/ ngus pa'i mchi ris 'dra ba 'am/ grog po sho sho na srin gnas so/ /sa rgod rdo 
24.14(1): rgod chu rgod rtsi rgod skyogs kyis ma bcus pa na klu gnas so/ /snying dang mkhal ma 
24.15(1): 'dra ba na klu gnas so/ /skad 'don pa'i chu mig lkugs pa na klu gnas so/ /gong 
24.16(1): gsum la btsan gnas so/ /dur chad rnying pa la klu gnas so/ /lha srin ma 'dus kyi 
24.17(1): lha khang mchod rten la klu gnas so/ /skyed rdo rtsig rdo la klu gnas so/ /gong gsum la 
24.18(1): gsum chu gsum gyi ru brag na klu gnas so/ /de ltar gnas par gyur pa'i sa de ru/
24.19(1): sa gnyan brkos sam/ rdo gnyan rlogs sam/ shing gnyan bcad dam/ chu gnyan 
24.20(1): bcus sam/ rtsi gnyan breg gam/ sa la me btsa' dang / sa la gtar kha dang /
24.21(1): sa la skar khung dang / sa la gseng ba dang / sa la tsha thur dang / grang thur dang /
25.1(1): rgya mtsho'i gos bshus pa dang / ri rab kyi lte ba phug pa dang / phyogs mtshams 'khrug 
25.2(1): pa'i mkhal sna dang / drag po'i las byas na/ lus zha ba dang / rengs pa dang /
25.3(1): longs spyod dbang thang tshe la gnod pa byed do/ /de ltar ma byas par mi dge ba'i 
25.4(1): rtags byung nas/ tshe snga ma la drag po'i las byas pas ma tshugs par/ dus da lta 'di 
25.5(1): ru gnod pa'o/ /dge ba la 'bad na rab tu phan no/ /dus da lta drag po'i las byas 
25.6(1): shing dge bar gur na sngon nas sbyangs pa'i dge ba dang / dus da lta'i dge sbyor drag 
25.7(1): po'i stobs kyis bzlog pa'o//dus 'di nas 'phos nas phyi ma sdug bsngal bar 'gyur 
25.8(1): ro/ /de'i phyir na drag po'i las rnams spang bar bya'o/ /dge ba'i las rnams dang 
25.9(1): du blang bar bgyi'o/ /klu bon ye shes snying po de ltar na/ lha mo dang / klu mo dang /
25.10(1): klu sman dang / 'brog mo dang / sman mo dang / klu 'brog mo dang / ma mo dang /
25.11(1): bdud mo dang / bdud srin mo dang / klu bdud mo dang / sa srin dang klu srin dang /
25.12(1): klu btsan dang / brag srin dang / klu bran dang / gnyan srin dang / bsam gyis mi 
25.13(1): khyab pa lha srid sde brgyad dang bsdongs nas/ ya bla bdud du brdzu/ ma bla chud du 
25.14(1): brdzu/ skya drang rgyal por brdzu/ drag po btsan du brdzu/ btsun po dmu ru brdzu/ sman 
25.15(1): dang 'brog tu brdzu/ lha dang sman du brdzu/ de ltar ya nga ba dang / 'jigs pa dang /
25.16(1): skyi bung bar brdzus nas/ longs spyod dang / dbang thang dang / chung srid dang srog 
25.17(1): lus la gnod par byed do/ /shar na gnas pa'i klu chen po brgyad dang sdong bar 
25.18(1): byed do/ /lho na gnas pa'i klu chen po brgyad dang sdong bar byed do/ /nub na gnas 
25.19(1): pa'i klu chen po brgyad dang sdong bar byed do/ /byang na gnas pa'i klu chen po brgyad 
25.20(1): dang sdong bar byed do/ /byang shar na gnas pa'i 'brog mo brgyad dang sdong bar 
25.21(1): byed do/ /shar lho na gnas pa'i klu bdud brgyad dang sdong bar byed do/ /lho nub na 
26.1(1): gnas pa'i lha mo brgyad dang sdong bar byed do/ /nub byang na gnas pa'i klu mo brgyad 
26.2(1): dang sdong bar byed do/ /dbus na gnas pa'i klu chen brgyad dang sdong bar byed 
26.3(1): do/ /gza' dang rgyu skar dang / lha chen po brgyad dang / bgegs dang / gnod sbyin 
26.4(1): dang / dri za dang gshin rje'i gdon rnams dang bsdongs nas sems can rnams 
26.5(1): la gnod par byed do/ /klu bon ye shes snying pos gshen rab la zhus sam gsol 
26.6(1): pa/ de ltar skye 'gro sems can rnams la gnod pa dang / 'tshe bar gyur pa 'di las 
26.7(1): kyi rnam par smin pa ci lta bu lags sam/ zhes zhus sam gsol pas/ gshen rab 
26.8(1): kyis bka' stsal pa/ klu bon ye shes snying po/ de'i nyes skyon 'di ltar ro/ /klu'i rgyal 
26.9(1): po 'od ldan dung skyong 'khor 'bum tsho bye ba sa yas bskor ba rnams kyis/ sngon skye 
26.10(1): ba dang po dpag tu med pa nas/ da lta'i dus 'di yan chad du/ rgyu dug lnga rang 
26.11(1): kha mar spyad pas/ las ngan pa klu'i rigs su skyes so/ /gtsang ma mi lus thob pa'i 
26.12(1): dus na/ tshul khrims ma thub pa'i klu ru skyes/ ngan song gnas nas thar dus med 
26.13(1): do/ /tshul khrims drag zhan stobs kyis ni/ la la ni klu'i g.yung drung sems dpa' 
26.14(1): gyur/ la la ni 'khor gyi klu'i g.yung drung sems dpa' gyur/ la la ni byol song 
26.15(1): klu ru skyes/ la la ni gzugs dpag tu med pa rgyang grags las 'das par skyes/
26.16(1): gzugs kyi tshul khrims ma thub pas/ lus kyi tshad la nges pa med/ de'i phyir na skye 
26.17(1): ba 'di la lus ngag yid gsum gus pas tshul khrims bsrungs/ klu 'bum 'di la 
26.18(1): brten nas rab tu bsnyen/ thar pa'i 'bras bu thob par nges/ de nas ston pas klu 
26.19(1): gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde dang / mtha' yas gzugs kyi sems can 
26.20(1): rnams kyi mgon dang skyabs su// gtsang ma klu yi dkyil 'khor gling dgu la pad ma 
26.21(1): brgyad cu rtsa gcig dang ldan pa// lha rnams dang sgo bzhi dang ldan pa/ ri rab gling 
27.1(1): bzhi dang bcas pa/ klu gnyan sa bdag gi snying sdum na/ snying sdum gyi dkyil 'khor 
27.2(1): bzhengs/ gzugs dang sgra dang dri dang ro dang reg bya dang / longs spyod rgyas pa'i 
27.3(1): mchod pa bshams nas/ thugs rje'i byin rlabs 'byung ba'i phyir/ dus gsum gyi 
27.4(1): bde bar gshegs pa rnams la 'bul/ rgyu sbyor yon bdag rnams kyi lan chags bu 
27.5(1): lon sbyang pa'i phyir/ bong ra shing rtsi dgu dgu bsogs/ rgyang bu brgyad cu rtsa gcig 
27.6(1): dang / shing rigs brgyad cu rtsa gcig dang / klu gtor brgyad bcu rtsa gcig dang /
27.7(1): mda' dar me long nam mkha' dang / sman 'bru rin chen sna tshogs dang / dkar 
27.8(1): dmar me tog rnams kyis ni/ sems can skye 'gro gang zhig gi/ pha ma med pa lta bu 
27.9(1): 'am/ sdug bsngal smre sngags 'don pa dang / tshe thung srog la sbur za ba/ bu med 
27.10(1): longs spyod dbang thang med/ 'khor med pa rnams kyi bu lon dang / lan chags 
27.11(1): gzhal ba'i phyir/ klu chen brgyad la mchod par phul bas/ lan chags dang bu lon 
27.12(1): byang nas/ sdug bsngal las grol nas/ longs spyod dang dbang thang rgyas par 'gyur 
27.13(1): ro/ /de nas dbus su gser gyi ri rab rgyu rin po che sna lnga las grub pa/ dbyibs 
27.14(1): kun tu gru bzhi/ bang rim dang bum par ldan par bri/ gser gyi bang rim bri/ zla 
27.15(1): gam bzhi kun dang mthun/ rigs lnga lte ba dkar ser sngon dmar nag po bkang /
27.16(1): phyogs bzhi pad ma phyogs mthun la/ mtshams bzhi ser ljang dkar dang sngon po bri/
27.17(1): mtshams bzhir lte ba dkar po la/ phyogs bzhi pad ma dbus dang mthun/ mtshams 
27.18(1): bzhi pad ma mdzes pas bkang / gru chad dkar ljang phyogs dang mthun/ lha rnams 
27.19(1): sgo bzhi rtsa ba'i dkyil 'khor tshul bzhin bri/ 'dod yon sngo dang dmar po bri/ gling 
27.20(1): bzhi gling phran lcags ris bskor/ rin chen mdzes pa la/ dar gyi cod pan rgyan 
27.21(1): gyis spras/ nam mkha' phyogs mthun rin chen mdzes/ shing ris klu gnyan zhal dang 
28.1(1): bstun/ kha dog ldan pa'i 'jim pag la/ rin chen sna tshogs sib tu bdar/ lung 
28.2(1): dgu chu dgu'i gzugs su bya/ klu gzugs rtsi sman sna tshogs rgyan gyis brgyan/ dkar 
28.3(1): dmar rin chen sna tshogs dang / rgya mtsho'i kha zhag snying po lnga/ blugs pas sa gter 
28.4(1): bya ba yin/ rin chen gze zhal gtsang ma ru/ dkar gsum mngar gsum gtor ma 
28.5(1): bshams/ klu gzugs sna tshogs rgyan gyis brgyan/ snying po stong dang rtsa brgyad bzla/
28.6(1): lan chags stong khri gzhal bar bya/ dang po spyan drangs bzhugs su gsol/ de nas 
28.7(1): mchod pa rgyas pa 'bul/ khrus bya sems bskyed dbang bskur gdams pa bstan par 
28.8(1): bya/ nad dang sdug bsngal byang nas thar pa thob/ gtsang ma klu'i snying 'bum las/
28.9(1): klu byung srid dang dkyil 'khor bca' ba'i le'u ste bcu gnyis pa'o// //
28.10(1): 7 ston pas gsungs pa/ klu bon ye shes snying po/ ri rab dbus kyi lte ba la/
28.11(1): ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ sku mdog g.yu ga ljang gi mdog 'dra ba/ phyag g.yas 
28.12(1): srid pa'i 'khor lo bskor ba/ g.yon na bdud rtsi'i bum pa thugs kar bsnams pa/
28.13(1): sku la g.yu dang mthing gi na bza' gsol ba/ dbu la rin po che yi prog zhu gsol ba/
28.14(1): spyi gtsug na srid pa'i khyung chen lding ba/ zhal klu'i rgyal khams la gzigs pa/ klu 
28.15(1): rnams 'dul ba'i gnyan por byon par bsam/ sku la 'od zer klu'i rgyal khams la 
28.16(1): 'phros pas/ klu rnams zhi ba'i sems dang ldan par bsgom/ sku las zer 'dus ye 
28.17(1): shes kyi 'od 'phros pa klu dug rnams sbyangs bar bsam/ zhal nas ha byas pas 
28.18(1): bdud rtsi'i chu rgyun byung nas klu'i rlangs dug zhi nas bde ba dang ldan par bsam/
28.19(1): zhabs kyis 'gros bor bas/ klu'i nyon mongs zhi nas rang la tshur mi rgol bar 
28.20(1): bsam/ klu kun g.yung drung sems dpar gyur nas/ sems can rnams la phan 
28.21(1): 'dog par bsam/ ri rab lhun po'i gdan la bzhugs pas snang srid zil gyis 
29.1(1): gnon par bsam/ ye shes lha yi 'od zer 'phros pas/ mu khyud bco brgyad zlum 
29.2(1): thig khor yug la/ stong nyid ye shes gsal ba'i 'od shar nas/ dpag bsam ljon 
29.3(1): shing rtse la khyung chen lding / rked par zhe sdang sbrul chen 'khril/ lo 'dab bdud rtsi 
29.4(1): char du 'bab/ me tog mdzes pa'i 'od zer 'phros/ 'bras bu sman du che zhing rgyas/
29.5(1): khyung lding sbrul 'khril brjid re che/ gser gyi ri bdun mdog re legs/ rol pa'i 
29.6(1): mtsho bdun gting re zab/ klu yi rgyal po bdun gyi gnas re bzang / klu yi rgyal po 
29.7(1): bdun bzhugs nyams re dga'/ shar phyogs zla gam dkar po'i gdan steng na/ sku 
29.8(1): sku ye shes snying po ni/ sku mdog dkar la 'od zer 'phro/ dbu la rin chen thor 
29.9(1): tsugs can/ phyag na rma bya'i rgyal mtshan bsnams/ lho phyogs zla gam sngon po la/ klu 
29.10(1): bon dbyar snyan khu byug ni/ sku mdog mthing kha rgyan dang chas/ phyag na g.yu rnga ding 
29.11(1): ba rdung / dbu la g.yu yi thor tsugs can/ zhal nas klu yi tshe rabs 'don/ sems 
29.12(1): can skye 'gro gso bar byed/ nub phyogs zla gam dmar po la/ gnyan bon thang thang 
29.13(1): gyer mkhas ni/ sku mdog shel 'od 'bar ba la/ dbu la rin chen thod rding 
29.14(1): 'khrungs/ phyag na ngang pa'i rgyal mtshan bsnams/ gnyan khams lo rgyus 'don zhing 
29.15(1): gnyan gzer nad rnams gcod/ byang phyogs zla gam ljang gu la/ sa bdag bon po 
29.16(1): khri stag ni/ sku mdog gser 'od mdangs dang ldan/ dbu la gser gyi thor tsugs 
29.17(1): 'khyil/ phyag na bdud rtsi'i bum pa bsnams/ glen lkugs nad rnams gso bar byed/
29.18(1): shar phyogs pad ma dkar po'i gdan steng na/ klu rgyal 'od ldan dung skyong ni/ sku 
29.19(1): mdog dung dkar phyis pa 'dra/ dbu rgyan dung sbrul stong gis brgyan/ phyag mtshan 
29.20(1): mdzes pa'i me tog bsnams/ zhal mdog gtso la bstan nas bzhugs/ lho phyogs 
29.21(1): pad ma sngon po'i gdan steng na/ / klu sman rgyal mo mdzes pa'i 'od 'phro ma/ phyag na 
30.1(1): mdzes pa'i gzha' tshon bsnams nas bzhugs/ nub phyogs pad ma dmar po'i 
30.2(1): gdan steng na/ gnyan gyi rgyal po rab tu brgyan/ dbu la g.yu yi thor tsugs can/
30.3(1): phyag na ngur ba'i rgyal mtshan bsnams nas bzhugs/ byang phyogs pad ma ljang khu'i 
30.4(1): gdan steng na/ sa bdag brtan ma gser mdog ni/ phyag na gser gyi bum pa 
30.5(1): bsnams/ sa bdag gtso mo mdzad cing bzhugs/ byang shar pad ma ljang khu'i gdan 
30.6(1): steng na/ gzed rgyal rtse dang khug pa ni/ phyag na lcags rnga ding ba bsnams nas 
30.7(1): bzhugs/ shar lho pad ma ljang gu'i gdan steng na/ gtod rgyal stong dpal chen po 
30.8(1): bzhugs/ lho nub pad ma dmar po'i gdan steng na/ klu 'brog rgyal mo ring nang 
30.9(1): skyol drug bzhugs/ byang nub pad ma ljang gu'i gdan steng na/ nam mkha'i lha mo 
30.10(1): gsal byed mdangs ldan ma/ nam mkha'i ba dan phyag na bsnams nas bzhugs/
30.11(1): gser gyi gru chad ser po la/ sa bdag lha mo brtan ma dang / sa bdag tsang tsang 
30.12(1): 'khor ba dang / sa bdag stong gsum kun khyab dang / sa bdag be sna rgod 'byung 
30.13(1): bzhugs/ rin chen snam bu gru bzhi la/ phyi nang 'byed pa'i gnyan gyi blon po dang /

30.15(1): phyi nang 'byed pa'i sman gyi blon po dang / phyi nang 'byed pa'i sa bdag klu gnyan gyi 
30.16(1): blon po bzhugs/ gling chen shar phyogs pad ma ser po'i gdan steng na/ klu rje'u 
30.17(1): rigs ser po zer 'phro stobs mchog ni/ dbu rgyan gser sbrul stong gis brgyan/
30.18(1): phyag mtshan gser gyi chag shing bsnams nas bzhugs/ shar phyogs pad ma dkar 
30.19(1): po'i gdan steng na/ klu yi rgyal po dung gi zur phud gcig pa bzhugs/ lho phyogs

31.5(1): mdzes pa'i gdan steng na/ klu yi rgyal po lcags kyi zur phud bdun pa bzhugs/

31.7(1): zur phud brgyad pa bzhugs/ gling chen lho phyogs dbus kyi lte ba dkar po'i gdan

31.9(1): stong gis brgyan/ phyag mtshan g.yu yi chag shing bsnams nas bzhugs/ shar phyogs

31.21(1): chag shing bsnams nas bzhugs/ shar phyogs pad ma dkar po'i gdan steng na/ klu

32.10(1): steng na/ klu gdol ba nag po 'dzin pa lag mang ni/ khro chu'i lus la sdom gyi yan 
32.11(1): lag can/ dbu rgyan khro chu'i sbrul nag stong gis brgyan/ phyag mtshan khro chu'i chag

34.9(1): gdan steng na/ klu bdud bu mo khyo ster ma/ sku mdog mthing nag 'od du 'bar/
34.10(1): mthing nag ral ga gos su gyon/ / mthing gi go cog mgo la gyon/ mthing mdzo sngon mo 
34.11(1): chibs su bcibs/ lag na sngon dmar dru gu thogs nas bzhugs/ lho phyogs pad ma

36.1(1): bskor/ sgo bzhi sgor srung bzhi yis srung / 'dod pa'i yon tan bsgom pa ni/ sngon

37.9(1): 7 de nas klu las grub pa'i bon po ye shes snying pos ston pa la skor ba byas nas/

37.11(1): la gtor nas 'di skad ces zhus so/ /rnam pa thams cad mkhyen pa'i ye shes drug cu 
37.12(1): dang ldan pa/ legs pa'i yon tan sum cu rtsa bdun dang ldan pa/ mkhyen pa'i yon 
37.13(1): tan du mas 'gro ba'i don la bu gcig pa'i ma ltar brtson pa'i skyes bu lags/ spyir 
37.14(1): klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde la/ gdung ba'i bon gtsang ma bag tsam 
37.15(1): gcig gsungs par gda' na/ klu rigs dkar nag gi 'bum bsam du med pa 
37.16(1): zhig gsungs na yang / don gcig gam tha dad pa zhig lags sam/ klu la bsam 
37.17(1): du med kyang rigs lnga kho nar nges sam/ klu yi dkyil 'khor mang yang don gcig 
37.18(1): gam/ rigs lnga klu yi dkyil 'khor kho nar nges sam/ 'gres rkang 'khor 'das

37.20(1): ro/ /gtsang ma klu rigs kyi bon la bsam du med kyang / don gyi mdo la thig le 
37.21(1): gcig tu 'dus so/ /byed pa'i las kyi go rim rang rang nas gsal la/ 'di ni klu'i 
38.1(1): snying bcos 'bum nag ces kyang bya/ klu'i snying 'bum sil ma zhes bya'o/ /'di ni 
38.2(1): sems can nad kyis gdung ba'i gang zag la/ gang la gang don du gnas so/ /rtsa 
38.3(1): ba'i klu ni rigs lnga la 'dus so/ /phye na bsam las 'das so/ /dkyil 'khor yang 
38.4(1): mang ste/ rtsa ba'i lha ni 'di la thug go /'di nas yang klu gnyan sa bdag gtod 
38.5(1): dang gzed kyi sde la yang / rtsa ba'i dkyil 'khor re yod do/ /bon thams cad kyi spyi 
38.6(1): dang sgos rigs mang yang / 'khor 'das gnyis kho nar grangs nges so/ /de bzhin 
38.7(1): du bon thams cad bdag nyid la 'dus so/ /klu yi dkyil 'khor la bsam las

38.9(1): dkyil 'khor kho na rtsa bar gsungs nas/ rigs lnga klu'i dkyil 'khor gyi go rim 
38.10(1): bstan par zhus pas/ legs so klu bon ye shes snying po/ de ni 'di ltar ro/ /dang 
38.11(1): po gnas kyi mtshan nyid ni/ me tog snam bu nyam dga' ba'i/ bkra shis byin che'i 
38.12(1): dben gnas su/ klu rgyal dung skyong mchod cing bsten par bya/ sbyor ba bsgom pa'i 
38.13(1): bsnyen pa ni/ bon spyod bya cha rdzogs par bya/ byang chub mchog tu sems bskyed nas/
38.14(1): mchod sbyin gtor ma rgyas par btang / de nas dkyil 'khor rim pa ni/ klu gnyan 
38.15(1): sa bdag yid btag la/ 'bru lnga dkar gyi mchod pa dang / mngar lnga me tog gtor 
38.16(1): ma sbyin/ de nas blang ba'i rim pa ni/ lug ra khyi phag snying sna la/ klu gnyan sa 
38.17(1): bdag snying sdum bya/ bkra shis sa ru byin gyis brlabs/ de nas sa slang pa'i cho ga 
38.18(1): brjod de/ e ma klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed/ dge ba'i bar gcod ma 
38.19(1): byed par/ gshen rab lha yi spyan snga ru/ khas blangs dam bcas ci bzhin du/ thun 
38.20(1): mongs mchog gi dngos grub stsal du gsol/ g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa srungs/
38.21(1): 'gro drug sdug bsngal zhi gyur cig /sa tshon lnga la dbang byed pa'i/ klu gnyan sa 
39.1(1): bdag gtod dang gzed/ ri rab gling la dbang byed pa'i/ bya stag g.yag 'brug 
39.2(1): seng ge'i zhal cha lugs mi sdug ci yang ston/ rtsub 'gyur dregs pa bdud dang 
39.3(1): mtshungs/ dngos grub 'byung gnas gnod sbyin te/ chang phud snying snas khyad bcos 
39.4(1): kyi/ dge ba'i las la sdong grogs mdzod/ gshen rab bstan pa gnyan po srungs/
39.5(1): bswo A+o~M na ga sa le yu/ rad na she a A+o~M hU~M/ a ha ra ye puM trang swahA/ zhes chang phud 
39.6(1): phyogs bzhi gtor/ rin po che 'bru snas sa slang la kun tu gtor/ de nas dkyil 
39.7(1): 'khor sa gzhi byin gyis brlabs te/phyogs bzhi'i sa yi bdag pos rin po che'i snod

39.10(1): dkar gsum chu yis chag chag gdab/ ga bur dri yis gtsang mar bya/ zangs 
39.11(1): lcags mkhar ba'i pun yang bcad/ sa mtshon sna lnga'i thig thag la/ tsan dan dang 
39.12(1): ga bur gyi dri bton la/ li khri ga bur gyis gcal la 'di skad do/ /bswo dbyings 
39.13(1): dang ye shes sprul pa las/ rgyu las grub pa'i tshon thag la/ dbyings shes gnyis su 
39.14(1): byin gyis brlabs/ thabs dang shes rab thig 'debs kyis/ mtshan bcas sgrib pa 
39.15(1): bsal ba dang / klu yi dngos grub grub pa'i phyir/ rigs lnga klu yi dkyil 'khor 
39.16(1): gsal bar mdzod/ thugs rje bri bkor mi mnga' bas/ klu yi gzhal yas gsal 
39.17(1): bar mdzod/ ces brjod la thig gdab po/ de nas tshon rnams dkyil 'khor dbus 
39.18(1): su bzhag la/ 'byung ba rnam pa lnga ru byin gyis brlab/ de lha lnga sku lnga ye shes lnga ru

39.21(1): shes 'phro 'du las/ ma chags bde ba thabs la rol/ tshon sna kha dog rang gsal 
40.1(1): bas/ ye shes lnga yi 'bras bu las/ nyon mongs lnga bsgral rigs lnga mtshon/ 'byung

47.15(1): des/ sems nyid rin po che shel lta bus/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag 
47.16(1): gtod dang gzed/ log par gol ba'i sems can rnams la/ snying rje tshad med pa 
47.17(1): bu gcig gi ma lta bur bzung nas/ 'gro ba'i don byed pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba 
47.18(1): sa yas/ yongs khyab tshad med kyi snying rjes bzung nas/ rgyu bsod nams kyi tshogs 
47.19(1): ji ltar 'dod pa thob par 'gyur ro/ /dga' ba tshad med pa nor bu rin po che stor 
47.20(1): nas rnyed pa lta bus don sgrub par byed pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa yas yongs 
47.21(1): khyab tshad med pa'i dga' ba skyes nas/ rgyu bsod nams kyi tshogs ji ltar 'dod pa 
48.1(1): thob par 'gyur ro/ /klu bon ye shes snying po/ 'khor ba'i bon rnam par dag pa dri 
48.2(1): ma med pa des/ sems nyid rin po che shel lta bus/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan 
48.3(1): sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde rnams la/ snying rje tshad med pa lta bus don sgrub 
48.4(1): par byed pa/ tshad med kyi sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa yas/ yongs khyab 
48.5(1): tshad med kyi snying rje skyes nas/ / rgyu bsod nams kyi tshogs ji ltar 'dod pa thob 
48.6(1): par 'gyur ro/ /byams pa tshad med pa pha 'am ma lta bus/ don sgrub par byed pa 
48.7(1): mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa yas/ yongs khyab tshad med kyi byams pa skyes nas/ rgyu 
48.8(1): bsod nams kyi tshogs ji ltar 'dod pa thob par 'gyur ro/ /btang snyoms tshad 
48.9(1): med pa gzhu mo'i rgyun lta bus don sgrub par byed pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa yas/
48.10(1): yongs khyab tshad med kyi btang snyoms skyes nas/ rgyu bsod nams kyi tshogs ji ltar 
48.11(1): 'dod pa thob par 'gyur ro/ /klu'i snying 'bum nag po las/ bsod nams kyi tshogs 
48.12(1): ji ltar 'dod pa thob pa'i le'u ste bco brgyad pa'o// //
48.13(1): 7 klu bon ye shes snying po/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang 
48.14(1): gzed kyi sde/ sdug bsngal brgyad dang 'du 'dzi bcu drug gis gdungs pa rnams la/
48.15(1): sems nyid rnam par dag pa'i skyes bu la/ dbang dang gdam pa bsnyen pa rdzogs pa/
48.16(1): rig pa'i don gang la'ang ma rmongs pa des/ 'gro ba sems can nad kyis gdungs 
48.17(1): pa dang / 'dod pas gdungs pa rnams la phan btag pa dang / bde ba la 'god 
48.18(1): pa'i phyir/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde rnams 
48.19(1): la/ sbyin pa'i mthar phyin pa sems rnam par dag pas/ me long lta bu'i ye shes 
48.20(1): dang / bya ba nan tan gyi ye shes dang / so sor rtogs pa'i ye shes dang / mnyam 
48.21(1): pa nyid kyi ye shes dang / stong pa nyid kyi ye shes dang / kun 'joms ye shes lnga'i 
49.1(1): sbyin pa bkye bar bya'o/ /gti mug gis gdungs pa rnams la/ ye shes kyi sbyin pa mi 
49.2(1): mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /'dod chags kyis gdungs pa rnams 
49.3(1): la/ sbyin pa'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /zhe sdang gis 
49.4(1): gdungs pa rnams la/ byams pa'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar 
49.5(1): bya'o/ /nga rgyal gyis gdungs pa rnams la/ zhi ba'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba 
49.6(1): sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /phrag dog gis gdungs pa rnams la/ yongs pa'i sbyin pa mi 
49.7(1): mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /de ltar sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye 
49.8(1): ba sa ya bkye na/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde/
49.9(1): sdug bsngal ba dang smre ngag 'don pa dang / pha 'am ma med pa dang / bu med cing 
49.10(1): nor dang zas med pa dang / longs spyod dang dbang thang med pa dang / nad kyis 
49.11(1): gdungs pa tshe thung srog la nur za ba rnams/ sdug bsngal las grol nas/ 'bras bu 
49.12(1): bsod nams ye shes kyi tshogs rdzogs te/ bla na med pa'i 'bras bu thob par 'gyur 
49.13(1): ro/ /klu bon ye shes snying po/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang 
49.14(1): gzed kyi sde/ sdug bsngal brgyad dang 'du 'dzi bcu drug gis gdungs pa rnams la/
49.15(1): sems nyid rnam par dag pa'i skyes bu/ dbang dang gdams pa bsnyen pa rdzogs pa/
49.16(1): rig pa'i don gang la'ang ma rmongs pa des/ 'gro ba sems can nad kyis gdungs 
49.17(1): pa dang / 'dod pas gdungs pa rnams la phan btag pa dang / bde la 'god pa'i 
49.18(1): phyir/ 'gro drug sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde rnams la/
49.19(1): thar pa'i bon sems rnam par dag pas/ me long lta bus ye shes dang / bya ba nan 
49.20(1): tan gyi ye shes dang / so sor rtogs pa'i ye shes dang / mnyam pa nyid kyi ye shes 
49.21(1): dang / stong pa nyid kyi ye shes dang / kun 'joms ye shes lnga yi sbyin pa bkye bar 
50.1(1): bya'o/ /gti mug gis gdungs pa rnams la/ ye shes kyi sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba 
50.2(1): bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /'dod chags kyis gdungs pa rnams la/ sbyin pa'i sbyin 
50.3(1): pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /zhe sdang gis gdungs pa la byams 
50.4(1): pa'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /nga rgyal gyis gdungs 
50.5(1): pa la zhi ba'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /phrag dog gis 
50.6(1): gdungs pa rnams la/ yongs pa'i sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar 
50.7(1): bya'o/ /de ltar na sbyin pa mi mthun mi 'dra ba bye ba sa ya bkye bar bya'o/ /'gro drug 
50.8(1): sems can klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde sdug bsngal ba dang / smre 
50.9(1): ngag 'don pa dang / pha 'am ma med pa dang / bu med cing nor zas med pa dang /
50.10(1): longs spyod dang dbang thang med pa dang / nad kyis gdungs pa tshe thung srog la 
50.11(1): sbur za ba rnams/ sdug bsngal las grol nas/ 'bras bu bsod nams ye shes kyi 
50.12(1): tshogs rdzogs te/ bla na med pa'i 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ /klu bon ye shes snying 
50.13(1): po/ bdag don bsod nams tshogs bsags de ltar zungs/ bar chad rkyen rnams 
50.14(1): zlog par nges/ gtsang ma klu'i snying 'bum las/ bdag don bsod nams tshogs 
50.15(1): bsags pa'i le'u ste bcu dgu pa'o// //
50.16(1): 7 gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ klu bon ye shes snying po/ klu'i snying bcos 
50.17(1): kyi phrin las tshig don 'di ltar zungs shig /dbang po ma yengs brtan par nyon/
50.18(1): gang zhing sems can nad kyis gdungs pa gdon gyis nyes pa/ shu ba g.yen pa 
50.19(1): 'bras dang chu ser yan pa dang / skran dang dmu chu dang / dreg dang grum bu dang /
50.20(1): sad dang ser ba btsa' dang mu ge dang / kha char bu yug skyin 'dangs 'khrug pa 
50.21(1): dang / then sreg me yis rtsi thog kam pa dang / srog la thug pa'i nad yams drag 
51.1(1): pos gdungs pa dang / mi mthun las kyi bskal pa mtshon gyis bsad bcad dang /
51.2(1): mi bde bar chad ye 'drog blo bur dang / rkyen ngan bar chad thams cad bzlog pa'i 
51.3(1): phyir/ phyi rabs rjes 'breng gshen rab dad ldan kun/ gtsang ma klu'i snying 'bum 
51.4(1): dri med 'di/ sems can kun gyi sdug bsngal sbyangs ba'i phyir/ mos dang gus dang 
51.5(1): brtson 'grus rab bskyed de/ 'bri klog zhal 'don byed pa dang / dus bzung 'don 
51.6(1): nam grangs bcad klog pa dang / 'gro don mthar phyir du/ snying 'bum sil ma las 
51.7(1): kyi mdo nang nas/ dus gsum bder gshegs klu gnyan sa bdag rnams/ 'khor 
51.8(1): dang bcas te spyan drangs pa ston te/dang po ka nor phrin las mkhan blo gsal 
51.9(1): ba/ dad pa che ba gcig gis rang lus gtsang ma dag par byas la/ mdzes pa'i rgyan 
51.10(1): cha gsol te/ zhal shar du gzigs la/ dag pa gsum gyi sgor bzhugs nas/ dus 
51.11(1): gsum gshen rab bla ma dang / rigs lnga bde bar gshegs pa rnams la skyabs su 
51.12(1): 'gro ba dang / phyag byas la rang bzhin cha lugs kyi phyag rgya lnga bcas la/ zhal nas 
51.13(1): khyung sngags zlos kyin/ ting 'dzin rnam gsum rim par bsgom/ de nas rang lus 
51.14(1): khyung du gsal ba yis/ gnas gsum du dus gsum gyi bla ma gsal btab la/ klu 
51.15(1): gnyan sa bdag gsum thugs la gsal bar bsgom la/ bar snang ri rab rgya mtsho 
51.16(1): chen po'i gling nas spyan drangs shing bzhugs su gsol te/ lce dag pa'i cho ga bya/
51.17(1): phyag 'tshal mchod par 'bul/ ting 'dzin sku bstod smon lam rnam par dag pa 
51.18(1): gdab/ brtse sems dang ldan par byas la/ phrin las mkhan sku btsun par bzhengs 
51.19(1): la/ tshig bshad kyis spyan drangs te/ A+o mi 'gyur g.yung drung bon gyi dbyings dkyil 
51.20(1): na/ dus gsum bder gshegs ma lus 'khor dang bcas/ 'gro drug thugs rjes 
51.21(1): bzung ba'i don slad du/ dkyil 'khor dbus kyi zla gam dkar po'i gdan steng du/
52.1(1): spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ mi mngon nam mkha'i dbyings 
52.2(1): dkyil nas/ mun gsal 'od las sprul pa'i gnyan/ spar ba dung mgo g.yu yi thor 
52.3(1): tsugs can/ ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ gzha' tshon 'od kyi gur khang 
52.4(1): nas/ dkyil 'khor dbus kyi zla gam dmar po'i gdan steng du/ spyan 'dren 'khor 
52.5(1): dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ 'og min dbyings kyi pho brang nas/ gser gyi bang 
52.6(1): rim gdan steng na/ rin chen 'bar ba'i gdan steng na/ me tog mdzes pa pad 
52.7(1): tshal rin chen steng / sa bdag brtan ma 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ dkyil 'khor 
52.8(1): dbus kyi zla gam ser po'i gdan steng na/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs

52.10(1): dang bcas pa rnams/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ gnyan 
52.11(1): dang sa bdag steng 'og gnyis nas sprul/ rin po che yi dkyil 'khor steng 'og 
52.12(1): 'dir/ spar chen spar chung la sogs gnyan gyi sde/ brtan ma dngul mdog la sogs 
52.13(1): sa bdag sde/ ma lus sran dang bcas pa rnams/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas 
52.14(1): te gshegs su gsol/ phyogs bzhi mtshams brgyad steng 'og nas/ klu yi rigs ni 
52.15(1): bsam mi khyab/ rtsa yi rigs ni bsam mi khyab/ dbus phyogs zur phud rgya mtsho'i 
52.16(1): klong dkyil na/ klu yi pho brang gzhal yas khang / dung mdog gsal ba'i pho brang na/
52.17(1): rgyal rigs 'od ldan dung mdog skyong ni/ sku mdog dkar po 'od du 'bar/ 'khor 
52.18(1): ni dkar po 'bum gyis bskor/ rin chen gser gyi khri steng na/ ma lus 'khor dang 
52.19(1): bcas pa rnams/ dkyil 'khor dbus kyi zla gam dkar po'i gdan steng du/ spyan 
52.20(1): 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ shar phyogs gser 'od 'bar ba'i 
52.21(1): rgya mtsho nas/ gser gur ser po'i nang shed nas/ rje'u rigs zer 'phro stobs 
53.1(1): mchog ni/ sku mdog gser 'od mdangs dang ldan/ 'khor ni ser po 'bum gyis 
53.2(1): bskor/ rin chen gser gyi khri steng nas/ ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ shar 
53.3(1): phyogs pad ma'i gdan steng na/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/
53.4(1): lho phyogs be+e ru sngon po'i rgya mtsho nas/ mthing gur sngon po'i nang shed nas/ dmangs 
53.5(1): rigs 'bar ba khyab ldan ni/ sku mdog mthing kha rgyan dang chas/ 'khor ni sngon po'i 
53.6(1): 'bum gyis bskor/ rin chen g.yu yi khri steng nas/ ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa 
53.7(1): rnams/ lho phyogs pad ma sngon po'i gdan steng du/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te 
53.8(1): gshegs su gsol/ nub phyogs ra ga dmar po'i rgya mtsho nas/ leb brgan dmar 
53.9(1): po'i gur khang nas/ bram ze ral chen ha la ni/ sku mdog dmar po 'od zer 'phro/
53.10(1): 'khor ni dmar po'i 'bum gyis bskor/ rin chen byu ru'i khri steng nas/ ma lus 
53.11(1): 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ nub phyogs pad ma dmar po'i gdan steng du/ spyan 
53.12(1): 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ byang phyogs dug mtsho 'bar ba'i 
53.13(1): rgya mtsho nas/ chu dar lcags mdog gur khang nas/ gdol pa 'dzin pa lag mang 
53.14(1): ni/ sku mdog mthing nag 'od du 'bar/ 'khor ni nag po 'bum gyis bskor/ khro 
53.15(1): chu 'bar ba'i gdan steng du/ spyan 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/
53.16(1): byang shar kun tu 'od kyi rgya mtsho nas/ klu rgyal dga' bo 'jog po ni/ sku mdog 
53.17(1): dkar ljang rgyan dang chas/ 'khor yang dkar ljang 'bum gyis bskor/ shel 'od 
53.18(1): 'bar ba'i khri la bzhugs/ chu dar dkar ljang gdan steng na/ ma lus 'khor dang 
53.19(1): bcas pa rnams/ byang shar pad ma mdzes pa'i gdan steng du/ spyan 'dren 'khor 
53.20(1): dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ lho shar sman rag 'phrul gyi rgya mtsho nas/ klu rgyal 
53.21(1): mtha' yas gzi chen ni/ sku mdog sngo skya rgyan dang chas/ 'khor ni sngo skya 'bum gyis 
54.1(1): bskor/ chu shel gtam pa'i khri la bzhugs/ chu tshag 'od kyis gur khang nas/ ma 
54.2(1): lus 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ lho shar pad ma mdzes pa'i gdan steng na/ spyan 
54.3(1): 'dren 'khor dang bcas te gshegs su gsol/ lho nub mthing las grub pa'i rgya 
54.4(1): mtsho nas/ klu rgyal om ra nag po ni/ sku mdog dmar nag rgyan dang chas/ 'khor 
54.5(1): kyang dmar nag 'bum gyis bskor/ rnam dag 'od kyi khri la bzhugs/ dmar smug 
54.6(1): dar gyi gur khang nas/ ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa rnams/ lho nub pad ma mdzes

55.9(1): 7 de nas yang gsungs pa/ klu bon ye shes snying po/ da ni 'di nas mar la

56.1(1): mi ma yin pa'i sde bsam gyis mi khyab pas bskor nas/ rgyan dang cha lugs mdzes 
56.2(1): par byas nas/ ston pa la klu rnams kyis pad ma rgyas pa zhi ba'i ma 'dal phul/ klu 
56.3(1): bon dbyangs snyan khu byug gis/ sna tshogs ma 'dal phul nas/ sa bdag rnams 
56.4(1): kyis 'khor lo rgyas pa drag po'i ma 'dal phul/ klu bon ye shes snying pos nas 'bras 
56.5(1): rin po che'i ma 'dal phul/ gnyan rnams kyis zla gam rgyas pa dbang gi ma 'dal 
56.6(1): phul/ ston pa la bskor ba byas/ lha phyag stong byas nas/ pus btsug thar sbyar nas 
56.7(1): ston pa la mchod pa phul nas/ kyai bdag dang rgyu sbyor yon bdag dang / khams 
56.8(1): gsum sems can thams cad kyi/ nyon mongs bag chags byang ba dang / sku gsung 
56.9(1): thugs dang yon tan phrin las lnga'i/ dbang dang dam tshig thob bya'i phyir/ lus ngag 
56.10(1): yid gsum dad pa yis/ mi 'khor bde bar 'dren mdzad gshen rab ston pa dang /
56.11(1): bla ma yi dam lha la mchod pa 'bul/ thugs rjes byin gyis rlobs la bzhes su 
56.12(1): gsol/ bzhes nas dngos grub bdag la stsol/ nyon mongs shes bya'i sgrib pa byang 
56.13(1): gyur cig /ma ni skye med don la spras/ 'dal ni kun la khyab par ston/ skye med ma 
56.14(1): 'dal mchod par bzhes/ ma ni kun snyoms nyi ma'i 'od/ 'dal ni brtse sems kun 
56.15(1): la khyab/ kun khyab don gyi mchod par bzhes/ ma ni gzhi'i rang bzhin la/ 'dal 
56.16(1): ni 'bras bu'i rang bzhin yin/ gzhi lam bon gyi mchod par bzhes/ gzhan yang 
56.17(1): mchod pa'i bye brag bsam gyis mi khyab pa phul nas/ gshen rab la gsol pa/ ston 
56.18(1): pa lags/ bdag cag 'khor dang bcas pa la/ thugs kyi dkyil nas man ngag

56.21(1): de la dgyes pa'i tshul bstan mchod pa yang dbyings su bstim nas/ bka' stsal pa/
57.1(1): klu bon ye shes snying po la sogs te/ klu gnyan sa bdag 'khor dang bcas/ mtha' 
57.2(1): yas gzugs kyi sems can rnams/ dbang po ma yengs brtan par nyon/ lus ngag 
57.3(1): yid gsum sdig spangs nas/ lus ngag yid gsum dag pa yis/ bsod nams rgyu 
57.4(1): las tshogs bsags phyir/ bkod pa lha yi ma 'dal gyi/ don dang dgongs pa 'di

57.7(1): brtsigs bang rim dod pa'o/ /zlum dang zla gam gru gsum gang 'dod dbyibs/

80.1(1): rtsa dgu pa'o// //
80.2(1): 7 de nas klu bon ye shes snying pos/ gshen rab la gsol pa/ ston pa'i sgron 
80.3(1): ma gshen rab mnga' bdag lags/ srid pa gsum nas dmyal ba'i gdar yan 
80.4(1): chad kyi ji snyed sa yi rdul bas grangs mang ba'i sems can kun/ dbul 'phong 
80.5(1): sdug bsngal nad kyis gdungs/ mi dge'i sdug bsngal 'thug pos gdungs/ shin 
80.6(1): tu sdug bsngal ba'i sems can rnams la/ mi mngon dbyings nas bzhugs pa'i 
80.7(1): dus gsum bder gshegs bla ma dang / klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed 
80.8(1): dang / rigs lnga klu yi dkyil 'khor gyi/ sa bdag klu gnyan 'khor bcas la/ lus

80.10(1): lags sam/ zhes gsol pas/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ klu bon de ni 'di ltar 
80.11(1): ro/ /dad pa skyo ngal med pa'i lus brgyud de/ sems can rnam par dag pas phyag

80.14(1): par dag pas/ bde bar gshegs pa'i dus gsum gshen rab dang / rten gyur 
80.15(1): sku gdung gsung rab ring bsrel dang / dus gsum sku gzugs sku gdung mchod

80.20(1): snying pos/ rgyan dang cha lugs mdzes par byas nas/ 'khor klu gnyan sa bdag gi 
80.21(1): bon po rnams kyis bskor bas/ khams gsum gyi sems can ma rtogs las ngan 
81.1(1): rnams kyi don du/ dus gsum gshen rab bla ma dang / mchod pa'i rten du gyur pa'i 
81.2(1): spyan lam du/ pus btsug thar sbyar gus pa'i tshul phyungs nas/ snyan pa'i ngag gis 
81.3(1): gsol pa/ klu bon gnyan bon gtod dang gzed kyi bon/ mtha' yas gzugs kyi 
81.4(1): sems can rnams/ ma rig 'khrul pa'i las dbang sems can gyis/ srog gcod 
81.5(1): rku dang 'dod log g.yem la sogs/ lus kyis sdig pa ci bgyis mthol lo bshags/

81.11(1): cag gdug pa'i gnyan khams kun/ nges pa'i don dam ma rtogs pas/ nga rgyal khro

81.13(1): gshen la bstan pa mthol/ lus kyi bden pa ma rtogs rdzu 'phrul stobs kyis ni/ spu 
81.14(1): mda' dug chu'i char pa dang / thog ser kha ba bu yug dang / khri mun g.yog dang

81.20(1): mthol bshags 'bul/ de nas sa bdag brtan mas bshags pa phul ba/ ston pa

84.8(1): nas dge ba la bkod pa'i le'u ste sum cu pa'o//

84.12(1): ba gtong ba dang / sngar byas kyi sdig pa la 'gyod nas bshags pa phul na/ bla na

84.14(1): bon po ye shes snying po/ klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed kyi sde/ de ni 'di ltar 
84.15(1): ro/ /mos pa'i dad pa ma phyir du bu 'breng ba lta bus bzung nas/ bsam pa rnam 
84.16(1): par dag pas klu slong bar byas te/ thar pa'i bon dge ba'i las la blo gtod la/
84.17(1): sdig pa mi dge ba'i las la 'gyod pa skyes nas bshags pa phul bas/ bla na med 
84.18(1): pa'i byang chub thob par 'gyur ro/ /klu gnyan sa bdag gtod dang gzed rnams 
84.19(1): kyis/ sngar byas pa'i las la 'gyod pa skyes nas/ gzugs kyi gti mug gi sdig pa 
84.20(1): la 'gyod pa skyes nas mthol bshags byas pas mun sgrib kyi blo byang nas/ shes 
84.21(1): rab gsal ba'i don 'char bar 'gyur ro/ /gzugs kyis 'dod chags kyi sdig pa 
85.1(1): la 'gyod pa skyes nas/ mthol bshags byas pas dbul 'phongs kyi sdig pa byang 
85.2(1): nas/ 'dod pa'i longs spyod 'phel bar 'gyur ro/ /gzugs kyis zhe sdang gi sdig 
85.3(1): pa la 'gyod pa skyes nas/ mthol bshags byas pas gdug sems kyi sgrib pa byang 
85.4(1): nas/ byams pa'i thugs rje skye bar 'gyur ro/ /gzugs kyis phrag dog gi sdig pa la 
85.5(1): 'gyod pa skyes nas/ mthol bshags byas pas bdag bstod gzhan smod kyi sgrib pa 
85.6(1): byang nas/ yongs pa chen po mngon gyur gyi thugs rje skye bar 'gyur ro/ /gzugs 
85.7(1): kyis nga rgyal gyi sdig pa la 'gyod pa skyes nas/ mthol bshags byas pas che grags 
85.8(1): ru nga'i sgrib pa byang nas/ zhi ba lhag mthong gi thugs rjes sems can la byams pa'i 
85.9(1): stobs skye bar 'gyur ro/ /de bzhin du klu bon gzugs kyis shes rab skye bar bya'o/ /
85.10(1): gzugs kyis yongs pa skye bar bya'o/ /gzugs kyis zhi ba la gnas par bya'o/ /
85.11(1): gzugs kyis byams pa bsgom par bya'o/ /klu bon ye shes snying po/ sa bdag klu 
85.12(1): gnyan gtod dang gzed kyi sde/ mos gus dad pa'i stobs kyis bsam pa rnam par 
85.13(1): dag pas/ sngar sdig pa mi dge ba'i las bgyis pa la 'gyod sems skyes nas/ dug 
85.14(1): lnga'i sdig pa rnams byang nas bla na med pa'i 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ /klu bon 
85.15(1): de ltar na/ sa bdag klu gnyan gtod dang gzed kyi sde/ khams gsum gyi sems 
85.16(1): can rnams kyis/ thar pa'i bon la gus pas btud de/ thar pa'i bon gyi ye shes la 
85.17(1): rab tu gsan par bya'o/ /sbyin pa la rab tu gsan par bya'o/ /byams pa la rab tu 
85.18(1): gsan par bya'o/ /zhi ba la rab tu gsan par bya'o/ /yongs pa la rab tu gsan 
85.19(1): par bya'o/ /dge ba la rab tu nyams su blang la btud na/ bla na med pa'i thar 
85.20(1): par thob par 'gyur/ g.yung drung gi bon gsal ba klu yi snying 'bum las/ rtsa ba 
85.21(1): bshags sbong gi le'u ste sum cu so gcig pa'o// //
86.1(1): 7 de nas klu las grub pa'i bon po ye shes snying pos/ ston pa la mchod pa phul 
86.2(1): nas zhus pa/ ston pa lags/ de ltar mthol bshags tshangs nas klu rnams ci ltar 
86.3(1): dag par 'gyur/ bka' stsal pa/ klu bon de ltar tshangs nas klu la ye shes 'char 
86.4(1): ro/ /klu bon sems can don la tha dad byar med de/ rtsa ba rang gi sems nyid dag 
86.5(1): nas klu la nyi ma 'char ro//rtsa ba dri ma dang mtshan ma bral nas klu la rtogs pa shar 
86.6(1): ro/ /rang 'gyod khong gcug byang nas bon la mngon shes skye ba'o/ /sgrib pa rnam 
86.7(1): gnyis byang nas bon la shes rab gsal ba'o/ /de'i phyir na klu yis bon la bsgom 
86.8(1): par bya'o/ /klu yis bon la spyod par bya'o/ /klu yis bon la rig pa'i rtsal sbyang bar 
86.9(1): bya'o/ /klu'i bon la rtogs pa'i nyams bskyong bar bya'o/ /klu yis bon la nges shes skye 
86.10(1): bar bya'o/ /klu yis bon la mtshon pa'i don la gsal ba'o/ /klu rnams gsal ba ye 
86.11(1): shes kyi don rtogs nas/ bla na med pa'i 'bras bu thob par 'gyur ro/ /zhes bka' 
86.12(1): stsal to/ /de nas klu bon ye shes snying pos zhus pa/ ston pa lags/ klu la rtogs pa 
86.13(1): de tsho skye bar byed pa la/ sgrib pa sbyong ba'i thabs ji ltar bgyi/ ston pas bka' stsal 
86.14(1): pa/ de'i thabs ni dus gsum sangs rgyas gshen rab bla ma dang / rigs lnga'i sprul 
86.15(1): par gyur pa'i klu rnams la/ dag pa lnga'i sgo nas mchod par phul na grub ces bka' 
86.16(1): bstsal to/ /lus dag pa'i mchod pa/ ngag gdung ba'i mchod pa/ yid mos pa'i 
86.17(1): mchod pa/ rdzas gtsang dag mdzes pa'i mchod pa/ gtsang dag lus kyi mchod pa de 
86.18(1): ltar mchod pa phul na/ klu yis bon la nges shes 'char ro/ /klu yis bon la rtogs 
86.19(1): pa skye'o/ /de'i phyir na mchod pa 'bul te/ phyag rgya thal sbyor gyi bar du mar me bcug 
86.20(1): la 'di skad do/ /oM snang srid nyi zla'i 'od dang mar me'i 'od/ la sogs mchod 
86.21(1): pa'i gsal sgron rnams/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can gyi/ gnyis sgrib mun pa 
87.1(1): gsal ba'i phyir/ mi mngon dbyings na bzhugs pa yi/ gshen rab bla ma dus gsum 
87.2(1): bder gshegs dang / rigs lnga klu yi dkyil 'khor gyi/ sa bdag klu gnyan gtod 
87.3(1): gzed dang / ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa la/ gzugs kyi lha mo mar me mas/ snyan 
87.4(1): pa'i glu dbyangs gar bsgyur zhing / dkyil 'khor lha la mchod pa 'bul/ thugs rje 
87.5(1): dang ni dam tshig gis/ gnyis med don gyis bzhes su gsol/ oM pus pa dud pa li 
87.6(1): swahA/ tsan dan bdud rtsi 'bul te/ phyag rgya dung phor gyi tshul du byas la 'di skad 
87.7(1): do/ /oM tsan dan rin chen bum pa ru/ bdud rtsi lnga sbyar dri chab 'di/ dkar gsum 
87.8(1): sman sbyar mtsho bskyil nas/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can gyi/ gnyis sgrib mun 
87.9(1): pa gsal ba'i phyir/ mi mngon dbyings na bzhugs pa yi/ gshen rab bla ma dus 
87.10(1): gsum bder gshegs dang / rigs lnga klu'i dkyil 'khor gyi/ sa bdag klu gnyan 
87.11(1): gtod gzed dang / ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa la/ gtsang ma'i lha mo tshan chab 
87.12(1): mas/ snyan pa'i glu dbyangs gar bsgyur zhing / dkyil 'khor lha la mchod par 'bul/
87.13(1): thugs rje dang ni dam tshig gis/ gnyis med don gyis bzhes su gsol/ A+o~M shud 
87.14(1): d+ho gu shud d+ho sang sal sale ye swahA/ phyag rgya g.yas g.yon du bsgyur zhing se gol 
87.15(1): tog la/ oM rnga gshang sgra dang dung dang pi wang dang / rgyun lbubs sgra las sprul pa'i 
87.16(1): mchod pa 'di/ bdag dang mtha' yas sems can gyi/ gnyis sgrib mun pa gsal

89.10(1): gzig skad/ zhang zhung skad dang bod skad dang / skad rigs lnga'i mchod pa phul 
89.11(1): bas/ dbyangs bde khungs btsun dge ba'i don las 'dus so/ /snying bcos 'bum

92.14(1): nas/ klu bon gyis/ dus gsum gshen rab bla ma dang / klu gnyan sa bdag gsum

92.16(1): zla gam dkar po'i gdan steng na/ ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ sku mdog g.yu yi 
92.17(1): snying po la/ dbu la rin chen prog zhu gsol/ g.yas na rin chen bum pa bsnams/
92.18(1): g.yon nas lcags kyu 'gro la ston/ sku la rin chen 'od zer 'phro/ pad ma zla ba'i

93.1(1): g.yu yi rgyan gyis brgyan/ phyag mtshan ngang pa'i rgyal mtshan bsnams/ rdzu 'phrul 
93.2(1): sna tshogs phyogs bcur 'gyed/ gnyan khams kun gyi mnga' bdag mdzad/ de la 
93.3(1): phyag 'tshal mchod pa 'bul/ dbus phyogs zla gam ser po'i gdan steng na/ sa 
93.4(1): bdag brtan ma gser mdog ni/ sku mdog gser gyi snying po la/ dbu la g.yu yi 
93.5(1): thor tsugs can/ phyag na gser gyi bum pa bsnams/ de la phyag 'tshal mchod pa 
93.6(1): 'bul/ dbus phyogs zla dkar po'i gdan steng na/ klu rgyal 'od ldan dung skyong ni/
93.7(1): sku mdog dung dkar phyis pa 'dra/ dbu rgyan dung sbrul stong gis brgyan/ phyag mtshan 
93.8(1): ud dum 'bar ba bsnams/ de la phyag 'tshal mchod pa 'bul/ dbus phyogs zla 
93.9(1): gam ljang gu'i gdan steng na/ 'dab chags rgyal po ka ru na/ sku mdog dkar la 
93.10(1): 'od zer 'bar/ gser gshog khyung ru zangs se zang / phyag mtshan sprul pa'i sbrul 
93.11(1): zhags 'debs/ de la phyag 'tshal mchod pa 'bul/ shar phyogs pad ma'i gdan 
93.12(1): steng na/ klu chen zer 'phrog stobs mchog ni/ sku mdog gser gyi 'od zer 'bar/
93.13(1): dbu rgyan gser sbrul stong gis brgyan/ phya mtshan me tog ud dpal bsnams/ phyag 
93.14(1): 'tshal bstod de mchod pa 'bul/ lho phyogs zla gam sngon po'i gdan steng na/ klu 
93.15(1): dmangs rigs 'bar ba khyab ldan ni/ sku mdog sngo smug 'od zer 'bar/ dbu rgyan 
93.16(1): g.yu sbrul stong gis brgyan/ phya mtshan me tog sngon po bsnams/ phyag 'tshal bstod 
93.17(1): de mchod pa 'bul/ byang phyogs pad+ma'i gdan steng na/ klu bram ze ha la ral chen 
93.18(1): ni/ sku mdog dmar po 'od du 'bar/ dbu rgyan zangs sbrul stong gis brgyan/ phya 
93.19(1): mtshan ha lo dmar po bsnams/ phyag 'tshal bstod de mchod pa 'bul/ byang phyogs 
93.20(1): pad+ma ljang khu'i gdan steng na/ klu gdol pa 'dzin pa lag mang ni/ sku mdog mthing 
93.21(1): nag 'od du 'bar/ dbu rgyan khro chu'i sbrul nag stong gis brgyan/ phya mtshan dug

148.19(1): phyag 'tshal lo/ /shar phyogs kyi sa bdag brtan ma shel mdog dung gi dbu la phyag 
148.20(1): 'tshal lo/ /lho phyogs kyi sa bdag brtan ma g.yu mdog mthing gi dbu la phyag 'tshal 
148.21(1): lo/ /nub phyogs kyi sa bdag brtan ma zangs mdog byi ru'i dbu la phyag 'tshal lo/ /

149.5(1): lo/ /byang shar gyi sa bdag tsang tsang 'khor ba la phyag 'tshal lo/ /lho shar gyi sa

149.7(1): mdog la phyag 'tshal lo/ /nub byang gi sa bdag be sna rgyal ba la phyag 'tshal lo/ /

149.9(1): 'brug sngon po la phyag 'tshal lo/ /nub phyogs kyi sa bdag g.yag rog po la phyag

149.13(1): pa'i sa bdag la phyag 'tshal lo/ /dus tshod la gnas pa'i sa bdag la phyag 'tshal

149.15(1): rab bla ma lags/ sa bdag brtan ma la sogs sa bdag thams cad kun/ bdag 
149.16(1): dang mtha' yas sems can ma lus pas/ thog ma cir yang med pa'i sngon rol na/

149.18(1): pa/ mi 'chab sems kyis mthol bshags 'bul/ gnong zhing dran nas 'gyod de 
149.19(1): bshags/ bshags pas dngos grub sdong grogs mdzod/ na mo dbus phyogs pad 
149.20(1): ma'i gdan steng gi/ gtso 'khor mdzad pa'i ston pa gshen rab mi bo ni/ sku mdog 
149.21(1): gser gyi snying po 'dra/ dbu la rin chen prog zhu gsol/ phyag na rin chen chag shing

168.3(1): phyogs su sprul pa las/ klu bo ti ku dang / klu 'brang yag gnyis su srid/ klu rje

168.5(1): gnas par sa gzhi la gnas pa'i bdag tu gshegs shig skad/ sras kyi zhal nas 
168.6(1): yab la zhus pa/ bdag gtsang ma klu'i rigs su gtogs/ rigs su btsun pa rgyal 
168.7(1): rigs su skyes te/ bdag gi snang srid khams 'di la dbang du bsdus pa'i bdag tu 
168.8(1): gshegs shig gsungs pa de/ bdag las che ba zhig 'byung ba'i zhus pas/ yab kyis 
168.9(1): bka' stsal pa/ srid pa klu'i bu klu rje 'brang yag gson dang / sa'i bskal pa klu 
168.10(1): yul nas/ klu'i rgyal po grangs dang sde ru mchis/ gser gyi sa gzhi ser po la/
168.11(1): mnga' dang bdag byed kyi sems can dkon/ yul 'di na dbang byed pa ni 'o skol 
168.12(1): klu lags te/ sa gzhi la mnga' mdzad pa'i sems can ni med/ de bas khyod sa'i 
168.13(1): bdag tu gshegs shig gsungs/ yab kyis de skad gsol pa dang / sras kyi bka' 
168.14(1): mnyan te/ klu rje 'brang yag sa'i bdag tu gshegs/ sa yongs su khyab pa kun 
168.15(1): 'byung gi bdag tu gshegs/ de dang skod lcam 'od ma'i zhal gyi kha rlangs dang sprul 
168.16(1): pa las/ srid pa'i sa bdag chen po gser sbal gyi lus la mi'i mgo bo can du srid/
168.17(1): des bskal pa thams cad thugs la gsal/ lus kyi sa gzhi kun la khyab pa lags/
168.18(1): de la/ zhang zhung skad du/ ri mu tis this zhes bya'o/ /bod skad du/ sa bdag lu hu 
168.19(1): ston/ des rgya mtsho rlabs chen gyi mnga' bdag mdzad/ de nas mon gser lcam ma 
168.20(1): dang sprul pa las/ sa bdag rgyal po 'od kyi lus la gsal ba'i thugs can du srid/
168.21(1): de la zhang zhung skad du/ srid pa mu gu zhes bya'o/ /bod skad du/ sa bdag khri khyab 
169.1(1): zhes bya'o/ /des stong gsum gyi stong 'bum la mnga' mdzad/ srid pa chen po khri'i 
169.2(1): bdag po mdzad/ de bas sa bdag khyar 'bum la khri khyab pa lags/ de'i thugs kyi 
169.3(1): sprul pa las/ mi lus lcags kyi mgo bo can/ de'i ming ni bdag lag can lags/
169.4(1): des dkar po khri 'phang la mnga' mdzad/ de rdzi dar rang du sprul pa las/ mi'i lus 
169.5(1): la 'od kyi 'dab ma can/ de la zhang zhung skad du/ mu de la rgyung zhes bya/ bod skad 
169.6(1): du/ sa bdag tsang kun khyab pa chen po zhes bya/ ri rab khri 'phangs g.yas pa la 
169.7(1): mnga' mdzad/ sa bdag tsang kun gyi kha rlangs dang / klu lcam 'od ma'i kha rlangs 
169.8(1): sprul pa las/ sras lcam dral bzhi ru bltams/ yab yum gnyis kyi ming mkhan so 
169.9(1): sor btags/ ming po gnyis ni so sor bdag gi rgyal po so sor bskos/ sring mo 
169.10(1): gnyis la bdag gi rgyal pos mor btags/ ming po la yab kyis mtshan btags pa/
169.11(1): phu bo srid pa'i sa bdag he ta sangs zer 'phang / nu bo srid pa'i sa la bdag tsang 
169.12(1): tsang 'khor du btags/ sring mo gnyis la yum gyis mtshan btags pa/ sa bdag 
169.13(1): gi lha mo brtan ma dang / sa bdag gi lha mo rgyal mo 'od ma mdangs gsal du 
169.14(1): btags/ sa bdag gi mi sring de bzhi yang / sa gzhi la mnga' che 'byung ba'i rgyal po 
169.15(1): dang / 'byung ba'i rgyal mo dang / sa bdag ho ban chu gshog dang / g.yu lcam 
169.16(1): mdangs dro'i zhal gyi ngad par sprul pa las/ srid pa'i sa bdag chen po ste/ mi'i 
169.17(1): lus la khyi yi mgo can/ lus la sum brgya gsum stong gnas/ de la zhang zhung skad 
169.18(1): du/ dri mu ling zhes bya/ bod skad du/ sa bdag stong gsum 'drol 'khor zhes bya/
169.19(1): sgo nga las kun nas 'drol ba des/ 'od dang mdangs su sprul pa las/ sa bdag 
169.20(1): 'dom pa sum brgya drug cu srid/ de bar snang khams la 'drol te gnas/ de la 
169.21(1): mnga' che ba 'dul zhing mang ba ste/ nu bo sa bdag tsang tsang dang khu rlangs sngon mo 
170.1(1): sprul pa las/ 'od rnam pa bzhi ru srid/ de las sa bdag chen po bzhi ru srid/ 'od 
170.2(1): dkar po las mi lus stag gi mgo can du srid/ de nyi ma shar phyogs kyi sa bdag 
170.3(1): rgyal po bskos/ shar na mnga' che ste rgyal po mdzad/ yang 'od ljang khu las/ 'od kyi 
170.4(1): mi la bya'i 'dab ma can du srid/ de byang phyogs khyab pa'i sa bdag rgyal po lags/
170.5(1): nyi ma byang gi phyogs na gnas/ yang 'od dmar po'i sprul pa las/ mi lus ru sbal gyi 
170.6(1): rkang lag can du srid/ de nub phyogs kyi sa bdag rgyal po skos/ nub phyogs nas 
170.7(1): mnga' che ste kun la khyab/ rkang bzhi sbal pa ltar 'dug pa srid/ yang 'od sngon po'i 
170.8(1): 'phro 'du las/ 'brug gi lus la g.yu'i mgo bo can/ nyi ma lho phyogs kyi sa bdag 
170.9(1): rgyal po lags/ lho na mnga' che kun la khyab/ de bzhi'i ming ni phyogs bzhi mi 'gyur 
170.10(1): ba'i sa bdag bzhi lags/ de bzhi snang srid khams na mnga' che bas/ sa bdag 
170.11(1): thams cad de las grol/ klu yi sa la mnga' mdzad pa/ sa bdag gi de la bya/ sa 
170.12(1): bdag rgyu bzhi de ltar lags/ zhes bka' bstsal to/ /yang sa bdag chen po tsang 
170.13(1): kun chen po dang / bar snang bu mor sprul pa las/ rdzu 'phrul gyi sgo nga kha dog dang 
170.14(1): ldan pa bzhi ru srid/ dung sgong zangs sgong shel sgong g.yu sgong bzhi dang / de bzhi 
170.15(1): yab yum gyis smon lam btab pa/ sgong bzhi yang bar snang khams na mnga' che bar 
170.16(1): shog cig gsungs te/ nam mkhar 'phangs nas/ nyi ma gsal ba'i lam 'grims te/
170.17(1): nyi ma phyogs bzhi la yang de bzhi las phyogs bzhi'i rgyal po bzhi ru srid/ de la zhang 
170.18(1): zhung gi skad du/ mu la sangs te zhes bya/ bod skad du/ gnyan chen po bzhi bya/ dung 
170.19(1): sgong shar du yang steng du 'od so'i nang du brdol pa la/ sgo nga'i shun pa dang / 'od 
170.20(1): kyi snyigs ma las/ dung brag dkar po ni nam lar srid/ bar gyi gdar sha la/ dung 
170.21(1): glang dkar po srid/ 'od kyi dwangs ma dang / sgo nga'i snying po las/ 'od kyi mi bo 
171.1(1): dkar po la/ 'od kyi mda' zung ba zhig du srid/ de'i ming ni shar gnyan dkar po 
171.2(1): kun gyi mgon byed ces bya/ nyi ma shar phyogs na gnyan de las che ba med/ dung gling 
171.3(1): dkar po la gnas/ dung mkhar dkar po na bzhugs/ dkor du dung gi ba glang 
171.4(1): dkar po dang / dung gi seng ge dang / dung gi g.yu 'brug dang / dung gi sbal pa la 
171.5(1): mnga' mdzad/ 'khor shar gnyan dkar po ni bzhugs/ nyis khri gcig stong mdzad/
171.6(1): shel sgong byang du 'dril ri li li/ 'od de sems can thams cad kyi bla na bzhugs/
171.7(1): ljang gu'i nang du brdol ba la/ shun pa las shel gyi brag nam mkha' khengs pa srid/
171.8(1): bar gyi gdar sha la shel mkhar dkar po srid/ nang na shel gyi mi po la/ lcags kyi 
171.9(1): ral pa can du srid/ de la ming btags pa/ gnyan gro bo stong 'dul zhes bya/ de 
171.10(1): shel brag la brten bca'/ shel mkhar la gnas/ gnyan khro bo 'bum phrag gnyis 
171.11(1): khris bskor/ dkor du shel gyi ba dang / shel gyi rta dang / shel gyi glang dang / shel 
171.12(1): gyi lug dang / shel gyi sha ba dang / de dag la mnga' mdzad do/ /byang phyogs nas 
171.13(1): gnyan de la che ba med/ zangs sgong dmar po de 'phar dang lhabs se lhabs/ 'od 
171.14(1): dmar po'i gling la bab ste/ 'od dang zer du brdol pa la/ shun pa las gser dang 
171.15(1): sa gzhi dmar po dpag tshad brgyad yod par srid/ sgo nga bar gyi gdar sha las 
171.16(1): zangs kyi ri rab srid/ sgo nga'i snying po las zangs kyi mi pho la 'od zer dmar po 
171.17(1): 'tshig pa srid/ ming ni nub gnyan dmar po stong stong ma yas bya ze zhes bya/ des 
171.18(1): zangs ri dmar po dang la brten/ zangs kyi sa gzhi la bzhugs/ sems can kun 
171.19(1): gyi dbang sgyur te/ g.yu sgong lho ru dril te/ 'od sngon po'i nang du brdol pa/ gnyan 
171.20(1): dmar po 'khor gnyan phran stong dang lnga brgyas skor/ dkor du zangs kyi rta dang /

172.1(1): dang / zangs kyi 'brug dang / zangs kyi bya la mnga' mdzad do/ /de ni nyi ma byang 
172.2(1): phyogs la dbang sgyur te gnas/ g.yu sgong lho ru 'dril te/ 'od sngon po'i nang du 
172.3(1): brdol pa la/ shun pa la g.yu'i sa gzhi gro bo srid/ bar gyi gdar sha las g.yu'i ri 
172.4(1): rab sngon po srid/ sgong chu las g.yu'i rgya mtsho 'khyil pa srid/ nang na g.yu'i sba skong 
172.5(1): can du srid/ ming ni gnyan gyi rgyal po dbyig rgyal kun 'dul zhes bya/ g.yu'i mtsho 
172.6(1): la mnga' mdzad/ g.yu'i sa gzhi la brten/ 'khor gnyan phran stong gis bskor/

172.11(1): la bar snang khams na bzhugs pa'i thams cad srid de rgyud spel/ de ltar na/
172.12(1): gnyan dang sa bdag gnyis su srid/ yang ston pa gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/
172.13(1): klu'i rgyal po rab dga' dang / srid lcam ye de ma bshos pa la/ klu'i rgyal po zhig tu 
172.14(1): srid/ zhang zhung skad du/ mi ling til tal zhes bya/ bod skad du/ klu'i rgyal po 
172.15(1): gtsug na rin chen zhes bya/ de dang bar snang klu'i bu mo dang / lha'i rgyal po kun 
172.16(1): zer sprul pa las/ klu'i rgyal po chen po bzhi ru srid/ yab yum gyis mtshan so sor 
172.17(1): gsol ba la/ zhang zhung skad du/ mu ting wer dang / gsal ting bar dang / ting 
172.18(1): bar dang / gting gsal 'byams dang / gting gsal 'di zhes bya'o/ /bod skad 
172.19(1): du/ klu'i rgyal po kun snyoms dang / klu'i rgyal po kun tu dbang dang / klu'i rgyal po

176.21(1): la ma rmongs thugs/ sgra skad kun la mnyam pa'i gsung / ston pa'i sku la phyag 'tshal 
177.1(1): lo/ /sems can thams cad srid cing drangs pa'i phyir/ gong du klu'i lo rgyus bshad

222.21(1): kun la mnga' mdzad pa/ klu'i g.yung drung sems dpa' rnams/ rtag tu gshen rab

311.21(1): stong gi phyag na/ dung gsas phe'u brgya dang rtsa brgyad bsnams pa dang / klu'i bu mo

368.15(1): dus lha gzhi g.yang bre gsas rto (rdo)gshegs su gsol/ gzu dpang bon bzhi 
368.16(1): rim par gshegs su gsol/ gshen po'i dbu la thod bcings zhal du gser g.yu 
368.17(1): bcug /phyag tu yas bzung sa bdag gi yas tshang bar bsags/ lug khyu bsre sgal 
368.18(1): nag gcig /bshas pa'i pags pas g.yang gzhi bya'o/ /sha phud don snying tshang bar 
368.19(1): bya'o/ /g.yang gzhi phyi kan du bting / de ru sbal bzhin du mgo lhor bstan/ rkang 
368.20(1): gzug g.yas pa pags pa'i steng du bzhag la tshogs par bya/ mchin pa shar phyogs 
368.21(1): khams la bsngo/ sems lho me khams la bsngo/ glo ba nub phyogs lcags khams la 
369.1(1): bsngo/ mkhal ma byang phyogs chu khams la bsngo/ mtsher pa dbus phyogs sa khams 
369.2(1): la bsngo/ sha phud don snying rna ba gsang mtshan la sogs te/ sman zan zur gsum 
369.3(1): pa lnga/ spyan gzigs zan mar lnga phrug la/ dong rtse lnga dang 'brang rgyas cha lnga phyogs 
369.4(1): bzhi dbus dang lnga ru bkod par bya/ dkar thog dmar thog dang / sha sna tshogs 
369.5(1): dang / khrag sna dang / mngar sna dang / 'bru sna dang / se'u thog me tog sna tshogs 
369.6(1): dang / sgog pa sna tshogs dang / rin chen sna tshogs gzhung nas byung ba bzhin du 
369.7(1): bsags/ phyogs bzhi dbus dang lnga ru bzang shing sna tshogs la dar dang / bal 
369.8(1): tshon sna tshogs bya spus brgyan la btsugs/ sang g.yag sang lug sang bya sna tshogs 
369.9(1): dang / gzhi mar 'bras skyems dang / 'bras bu sna tshogs pa'i ngar mi dang / zhal 
369.10(1): zas bcu gnyis kyi gzugs bya la/ dbang tshod kyi phyogs na bskyal/ shog shog dong 
369.11(1): tse mkhar ba'i dong tse dang / gser dngul dong tse dang / dong tse ci 'byor bsags/
369.12(1): byi thod glang thod ra lug bya dang 'brug shing bzang bya sna tshogs kyi sa bdag so sor 
369.13(1): rdzongs/ shing tsha rgya tsha lan tsha kha ru tsha/ phyi sgo gtsong g.yer ma dgos/ nor bu gzi 
369.14(1): mchong spu dang me long rgya mtshal/ / ral ba drub phyir khab skud bsags/ yo ba srang 
369.15(1): phyir thig shing dgos/ me tog phreng bas brgyan/ lhab lhub mdzes brjid stag gzig 
369.16(1): dgos/ mngar sna ka ra bu ram yung ba dang / spos sna mkhan shug dri zhim lha lung 
369.17(1): sman sna bsags/ rnga rta mdzo g.yag bong dre'u dang / bya sprel ra lug khyi phag dang /
369.18(1): rgya nag 'og sgom pha wang pags/ bzo rigs bya rigs smyug sogs phu la sogs pa 
369.19(1): bkod pa dang / ral gri'i chu srin dzir byi dang / nya lcong sbal sbrul dang / dom dred 
369.20(1): 'phar spyang dang / khra sram gong srag dang / ri bong gla ba dang / phyi grum shu'u 'ug 
369.21(1): pa srin bya phu shud dang / kham dang shel dang ste'u zhun dang bcas/ wa dang sre mo 
370.1(1): bya rog skya ga dang / zer mo bya wang khrung khrung dang / ra thug gla ba byi long dang / bu 
370.2(1): rgyud thang can gyi lham dang zhwa dang mgur chu gdub/ khrab rmog phub dang / rkang sbab 
370.3(1): la sogs pa dred kyi thal mo gong gi sbar zhog dang / sa bdag 'dod yon dkor cha 
370.4(1): so sor bsags/ sku rten dbyar pa stag pa nya breg dang / shug pa sur dkar spen 
370.5(1): pa dang / sba dkar smyug ma thang dkar dang / sur bu tshar bu dang / 'brug shing 
370.6(1): lcang ma lcug ma lcang dkar dang / sku rten shing rnams so sor bsags/ ba dan rgyal 
370.7(1): mtshan dbal dar lhab lhub gdugs la sogs/ mthing shun dar gyi sbu gur phub/
370.8(1): ku lang shel gyi gsas rdo btsugs/ rnga gshang dung gling sil snyan dkrol/ mar lug 
370.9(1): mar bya mar khyi nam mkha' dang / thod yas sna tshogs dang / mi lud zan gyi gtor 
370.10(1): ma dang / dme yas sna tshogs dang / nal yas thod yas dgos/ rgyal gyi go cha tshang 
370.11(1): bar dgos/ snying dang gshed dang dgu mig bdun zur btsa' tshig ngan/ slong rten 
370.12(1): ngan/ lo srog mi mthun pa gza' skar gang la'ang / 'dod yon gzhung ltar phyogs 
370.13(1): bzhi mtshams bzhi dbus kyi sa bdag mchod gtor 'dod yon gzhung ltar ro/ /lde 
370.14(1): mig chung ngu nang na gsal lo/ /ces sa bdag mchod rdzas bshams pa'i le'u ste lnga 
370.15(1): pa'o// //
370.16(1): 7 'di nas mar sa bdag gi go rim bstan pa ni/ dang po gang yang rung ba'i 
370.17(1): gnas su phyin pa dang / bstan bde mo'i steng du lus bde bar bzhugs/ ban bon 
370.18(1): drangs can rgya brten mang po bzhag /sha 'debs thang khrim dang dgos ched lo rgyus 
370.19(1): bya/ 'byor tshad kyi yon yar la bsngo/ thob thang gis yas mar la bzhag /gshen 
370.20(1): po rang gi lus srung btsugs/ ting nge 'dzin bskyed rim legs par bya/ yon 
370.21(1): bdag sems ma yengs lus brtan par sdod du bcugs/ chem chem krog ge nyan 
371.1(1): bcug /gshen pos kyang cang tshig snyan pa ngag 'jam pa'i sgo nas/ smra ba dal du 
371.2(1): bya/ 'khyal pa can gyi gtam bya mi rung / bu bas phal la kha mi gtse/ khye'u mchod mi 
371.3(1): kha mi gtse/ gcam bu smra 'dod dang / tshig mi sbrel/ 'gro 'dod rkang bya dang tshong 
371.4(1): mi sbrel/ khyim mtshes rgan mo la gtam mi tshol/ tshong dang 'phrul gtad dang zhal 
371.5(1): lce'i 'gram du mi 'gro/ shed tshol skugs dang mda' 'phen rngon pa dag dang grogs 
371.6(1): mi 'thu / lus gus par bya/ ngag byang bar bya/ sems dang bar bya/ bdag kyang 
371.7(1): sems mi yengs zhi ba'i sgo nas/ dang po rin po che dang / she'u tshig gzhi mar gyis 
371.8(1): sa la mkhyen pa gsol la sa slang / dpal mgon mchod/ dang po rin chen dang spros 
371.9(1): chag chag gdab/ thig dang tshon bkye/ dkyil 'khor rgyan cha tshang bar bya/ sdig pa 
371.10(1): bshags la me tog gtor/ de nas 'dod yon tshang bar bkod/ dus gsum bder 
371.11(1): gshegs la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sdig pa bshags la me tog gtor/ de nas 'jig rten 
371.12(1): sa bdag lha klu gza' dang rgyu skar rnams la gsol ba gdab/ skabs su bon bzhi'i 
371.13(1): rim par bya/ bum pa mchod pa bkram par bya/ sems can gzhi dug lnga yin pas na/
371.14(1): 'gyod tshangs mthol lo bshags/ sa bdag gi gzhi rnam rtog yin pas na/ bsang 
371.15(1): dang byi dor bya/ g.yang gzhi med dam yod kyang rung / ru sbal gyi 'khor lo la sa 
371.16(1): bdag gi dkyil 'khor pad+ma 'dab can bri/ bar khams brgyad kyi sa bdag so sor 
371.17(1): bkod/ gza' dang skar ma rnams kyang de bzhin du bkod/ dur gshed tshang bar 
371.18(1): 'di na phyag rgya tshang bar bri/ dur gshed ma dom pa'ang dur phug ma shi na/ gshed 
371.19(1): gang gi thog tu shi ba gang 'khrugs pa dang sbyar/ gang 'khrugs pa'i phyag rgya bri kun 
371.20(1): bri mi 'tshal lo/ /smrang rgyud gzhung nas 'byung ba bzhin bya/ smrang rdzogs pa dang dug 
371.21(1): phyung bya/ rtsi sman gsol/ de nas zhi ba bya/ dor ma sgyur dang gshed po kha sgyur bya/
372.1(1): gser skyems skyogs gang sa bdag gshin rje la las mthun pas/ phyogs su bskyal 
372.2(1): lo g.yang gzhi dang gshed sgro brdab la/ sa bdag gi gshed kha bcad par bya/ dar 
372.3(1): mdos dang rgyal mdos 'gag tu bskyal/ mar la rim par bya/ de nas sa bdag la 
372.4(1): mchod pa legs par bya/ de nas khrus dang skyabs su gsol/ bkra shis legs par 
372.5(1): bya/ mchod yon re res sa bdag la 'dod yon bzang por bya/ mchod yon gsas 
372.6(1): bshos mar me phal chen dang / rtsi sman gtor ma shing dkar gyis/ zhi ba dkar po'i 
372.7(1): sbyin sreg legs par bya/ sku'i pe'u rtse gshog sdud bya/ ces sa bdag las kyi go rim 
372.8(1): bstan pa'i le'u ste drug pa'o// //
372.9(1): 7 de yan chad ni sa bdag gi sgyur bcos gcig pa'o/ /da 'di nas mar la sa 
372.10(1): bdag dang klu dang gnyan dang gsum mi rgyud smon pa dang bzhi/ lha rgyud gshen dang 
372.11(1): lnga'i lo rgyus la/ dang po nyid du ci yang med pa'i rang bzhin la/ srid pa ye yod 
372.12(1): cung tsam srid/ de la rlung gi 'khor lo chags/ de'i steng du ngad dang bag tu chags/
372.13(1): ngad dang bag tu sprul pa las/ gser gyi sa gzhi 'o spris tsam gcig la gcig rten/
372.14(1): de ltar sprul pa'i sras la/ klu gnyan sa bdag gi rgyu 'bras dang / mi dang lha gshen 
372.15(1): gyi rgyu 'bras chags/ bag las srid pa'i sgo nga bzhi ru srid/ chu dang drod kyi sgo nga 
372.16(1): las srid pa min/ lbu ba mtsho dang rlung gis bskyod nas/ gser gyi sa gzhi spri pa 
372.17(1): tsam gyi steng du babs/ lbu ba las sgo nga 'dril/ sgo nga dkar po rdol ba'i nang shed 
372.18(1): nas/ sems can chen po gcig srid pa ni/ sku lus dkar po chag gang la/ dbu skra 
372.19(1): nag po gcig tu srid/ sgong gcig rdol ba'i nang shed nas/ lus po sngo la thugs ka 
372.20(1): dkar po gcig tu srid/ sgo nga rdol ba'i nang shed nas/ gnyan gyi rgyud dang 'bras 
372.21(1): bu grol/ sgong gcig rdol ba'i nang shed nas/ mi'i rgyud dang 'bras bu grol/ lus 
373.1(1): po sngo la thugs dkar ba rang gi mtshan gsol ba/ ye bon mtha' sangs zhes kyang 
373.2(1): bya/ rlung gi gshen po smigs pa re re yang bya/ gshen po de ni rdzu 'phrul gzhan bas 
373.3(1): 'phags pa chen po 'phags pa mkhyen ces de la bya/ sku dkar la dbu lo sngo ba de la 
373.4(1): ming dang mtshan gsol ba ni/ skye 'gro thams cad kyi mes po smon ming dbu nag tu 
373.5(1): mtshan gsol pa/ khong du blo gsal bas zhal du dbugs kyang rgyu'o/ /bsam gtan 
373.6(1): li snying la dgu yod de/ pha dang ma las ma srid kyang / srid pa dang po lags/ de'i 
373.7(1): zhal nas smon lam btab pa lags/ dbu'i sprul pas gnam phub zhabs kyi sprul 
373.8(1): pas sa yang btings/ rgya mtsho sa chu skyed/ rlung gi dbugs phyung / sku'i sprul pa 
373.9(1): las/ rgya mtsho'i dbus su ri rab srid/ rgyud pa la dpe blang ste/ ri rab srog shing 
373.10(1): bsal/ de la ming dang mtshan gsol ba/ rtsa ba rgya mtsho la chags te/ sa gzhi la 
373.11(1): gzhi brtan nas dpag bsam ljon shing zhes kyang bya/ srid shing ljon dkar zhes kyang 
373.12(1): bya/ shing la mtshan dgu yod pa lo 'dab rgyas pa/ rtse mo srid pa'i rtse la 'phags 
373.13(1): pa/ yal ga bcu yod pa lo ma gzugs su dod pa/ shing de'i rgyu 'bras ni sa chu me 
373.14(1): rlung nam mkha' lnga las grol bas ri rab srog shing du srid pa/ de la 'byung ba lnga 
373.15(1): zhes bya ba/ ri rab srog shing srid pa/ sa chu me rlung lcags las grol bas/ srog lnga 
373.16(1): bskyed ces de la bya/ gser dngul g.yu zangs su srid/ rin po che gser gyi sa gzhi 
373.17(1): zhes kyang bya/ ri rab ljon shing gnyis rgya mtsho'i rlabs la brten/ de la rlung brten/
373.18(1): rlung la me brten/ me la chu brten/ chu la sa brten/ sa la skye 'gro sems can kun 
373.19(1): kyang brten/ ri rab la sa bdag klu gnyan kun brten/ dmu bdud 'tshams dang 
373.20(1): gsum/ lha kar rten dang gsum ri rab la srid de chags/ de rnams kyi kha lo bon 
373.21(1): dang gshen gyis sgyur bar srid/ gtsug lag srid pa la brten/ bskal pa de'i dus 
374.1(1): tsam na/ shing de'i lo ma ru/ gzugs dang po byi ba'i gzugs su byung / byi ba'i lo 
374.2(1): zhes kyang bya/ shing gi lo ma la srid pas na/ lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og shed na/ glang 
374.3(1): gi gzugs su byung / glang gi lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu stag gi gzugs su byung /
374.4(1): stag gi lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu yos bu'i gzugs su byung / yos bu'i lo zhes 
374.5(1): kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu 'brug gi gzugs su byung / 'brug gi lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 
374.6(1): 'og tu sbrul gyi gzugs su byung / sbrul gyi lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu rta'i gzugs 
374.7(1): su byung / rta'i lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu lug gi gzugs su byung / lug gi lo

374.10(1): khyi'i lo zhes kyang bya/ de'i 'og tu phag gi gzugs su byung / phag gi lo zhes kyang bya/
374.11(1): de la sa gzhi ru sbal brten te/ ru sbal gyi bu yin pas/ de'i drang mkhan ni/ gser 
374.12(1): gyi drang mkhan ni/ gser gyi me 'bar ba dang / bon chos rdzu 'phrul las/ nyin gyi 
374.13(1): nyi ma srid/ chu shel gsal ba las/ mtshan gyi zla ba srid/ rlung lcam 'khrugs pa

374.15(1): su bgrang / zla ba bcu gnyis la zhag sum brgya drug cu grangs/ zhag sum brgya drug 
374.16(1): cu la za ma bdun brgya nyi shu'i grangs/ de la lo'i dang po byi bas dbang / de'i 'og 
374.17(1): ma glang gis dbang / de'i 'og ma stag gis dbang / de'i 'og ma yos bus dbang /

374.21(1): la srid pa'i pha ma ru sbal 'dod bzhed dang / srog lnga'i mkhar dang / phyogs bzhi

377.1(1): sring gnyis kyi 'tshos pa'i zla ma rnyed na/ rabs chad rgyud med mi rung bas/ ming

377.3(1): gtsigs byas/ gcig gis tho yang btsugs/ mna' tho bya ba yang de nas srid/ ming 
377.4(1): sring rtsog g.yos kyi bu/ nyi ma nub byang mtshams su 'dug pa ni/ sa bdag lcags pho 
377.5(1): khyi yin te/ da lta yang nub byang mtshams su bzhugs/ srid pa dang po'i bu yin pas/
377.6(1): skyon yang de bzhin che la dbang yang de che'o/ /ming sring nal dang btsog g.yos kyi 
377.7(1): bu yin pas/ sa bdag mi srun pa yin pa'o/ /mna' g.yos dang rtsog gi gsang de 
377.8(1): gshed du song ba yin/ de nas sa bdag li me yab khen pha rgan po la phyag 'tshal du 
377.9(1): song ba la/ pha ni phyir gzhon nu bu chung ni rgas nas/ yab sras yin pas kyang zhal 
377.10(1): ma mjal nas/ yab sras bshos pa'i sras ni/ rta dang sbrul du byung / de ltar rta 
377.11(1): sbrul lo pa dag la/ yos bu sna ring med mi srid/ de nas khen pha rgad po'i sdig byas

377.13(1): rting zhal yin pas/ khen pha rgad po 'tshangs kyin ljibs te shi/ de'i ro 'dzin zon

377.15(1): pas/ dra la dbang ba kun la dri bo dang / sha ru med mi srid/ li mi mang po dang pha

386.21(1): thod bcings/ zhal du gser g.yu gsol/ yon bdag la srung btsan bkod de 
387.1(1): 'di skad/ na mo dus gsum gyi bde bar gshegs pa la phyag 'tshal lo/ /ston pa 
387.2(1): gshen rab mi bo ston pa'i mchog dang lha'i dbang po tshangs pa ni/ lha srin gnyis kyi 
387.3(1): gzu dang dpang / lha dang mi'i phyogs rnams bde bar mdzod/ dkar po'i phyogs 
387.4(1): rnams rgyal bar mdzod/ de ring sa bdag bcos pa'i gzu dpang mdzod/ sa'i lha 
387.5(1): mo bstan ma ni/ snga phyi kun gyi gzu dang dpang / 'das dang ma byon da lta kun gyi 
387.6(1): yum yin pas/ de ring sa bdag bcos pa'i gzu dang dpang po mdzod cig /rgya 
387.7(1): kong tse 'phrul gyi rgyal po yang / gto byed mkhyen pa'i yo ka la srid/ de ring sa 
387.8(1): bdag bcos pa'i gzu dang dpang mdzod cig /rgyu sbyor yon bdag 'di dag gis/

387.10(1): ba ma 'dur ram/ dug lnga'i dbang gis gnyen po ngo ma shes nas gtod la zhal ma 
387.11(1): 'tshal lam/ gnam gshed bcu dang sa gshed bcu dang / mtshams kyi gshed bzhi 
387.12(1): dang / gtsug lag ma shes pa'i gshed kyi pha gum/ gshed kyi ma gum/ sa bdag 
387.13(1): gshed kyi tsha bo gum/ sa bdag gshed rnams ngo ma shes pa'i lan/ gum pa'i skye 
387.14(1): mched kyis/ rgan gshed gzhon gshed byas pa'am/ pho gshed mo gshed byas pa dang /
387.15(1): chung gshed che gshed byas pa rnams/ de ring phyin chad nas sa bdag gshed po la 
387.16(1): kha mi che/ sa bdag gshed po la lag mi ring / sa bdag gshed po la zur mi za/ sa 
387.17(1): bdag gshed po la don mi ba/sngo/ de ring gdugs gong la sa bdag gshed po'i 
387.18(1): gshed kha sgyur 'tshal lo/ /shar phyogs sa bdag dang / lho phyogs sa bdag dang /
387.19(1): nub phyogs sa bdag dang / byang phyogs sa bdag dang / dbus phyogs kyi sa bdag 
387.20(1): dang thugs dang 'gal ba bcos so/ /gza' dang rgyu skar bcos pa'i don du/ dus 
387.21(1): gsum gyi bde bar gshegs pa rnams kyi gzu dpang mdzod/ ston pa gshen rab mi 
388.1(1): bos gzu dpang mdzod cig/skye 'gro kun gyi yab smon mi dbu nag gis kyang gzu 
388.2(1): dpang mdzod cig /srid pa'i drang mkhan rnams kyis gzu dpang mdzod cig /gzu 
388.3(1): bzhi dpang brgyad gzu dpang mdzod cig /gnam gyi che mo che bzhi dang / gnam 
388.4(1): gyi ye shes bzhi dang / sa'i mthong brgyad rnams kyis gzu dpang mdzod cig /smon 
388.5(1): pa'i drang mkhan mun rum dkar po dang /phya'i drang mkhan 'brang zur yang pa dang /
388.6(1): dmu'i drang mkhan lha rje drang mkhan dang / srid pa'i drang mkhan lha gzu pe'u tang 
388.7(1): dang / drang mkhan ye shes spyan gsum dang / gser thub gzhung bzhi dang / de ltar 
388.8(1): drang mkhan rnams kyis gzu dang dpang po mdzod cig /gshed kha sgyur ba'i gzu 
388.9(1): dpang mdzod cig /dur sgo gcad pa'i gzu dpang mdzod cig /gnam sgo gcad

388.12(1): bsgyur ba dang / dgra sri'i khram kha bsgyur ba dang / god kha gcod pa dang / dgra
