388.19(1): btsugs pa'i le'u ste bcu gnyis pa'o// //
388.20(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag bcos pa'i sngon rol na/ dang po klu srin bkar ba'i 
388.21(1): le'u'o/ /gtor ma nyi shu rtsa gcig dang / shing stag ma dang rtsa gu gul gyis/ klu srin 
389.1(1): mi lus ra mgo sbrul mjug can/ brag nag po dang mtsho nag po'i rtsa nas bkar 
389.2(1): ro/ /dang po klu srin gang na srid na/ chu shel gyi brag nag po'i nang na srid/ sa 
389.3(1): bdag ni/ srin po rgad po zhig srid/ mtsho'i bdag mo ni gnyan gyi mi gcig srid pa 
389.4(1): de lo lnga brgya lon nas bskal pa phra mo rdzogs/ skyin 'dangs phra mo byung nas mtsho'i 
389.5(1): snying la kha gdangs/ nya chu nang bsnyigs pa'i gtan tshigs kyang der srid/ gnyan 
389.6(1): gyi ma de rgya mtsho'i zhabs nas/ khar byung ba la/ srin po rgad po'i gzugs de gnyis 
389.7(1): slong mal gcig tu sdebs pa la/ brag gi kha na skyin kha ru rings de yis mthong /
389.8(1): brag gi rtsa ba na chu sbrul nag pos kyang gzigs/ de'i slad kyi lor sras shig bltams 
389.9(1): pa de/ gnyan gyi ngo bo la srin gyi lus/ shel gyi rwa la sbrul gyi mjug ma can/ de la 
389.10(1): shing gi bskal pa ru/ sgron shing dang bya bcas de la byin/ rtsa'i bskal pa ru ldam bu 
389.11(1): chu rka byin/ gnas kyi bskal pa ru brag chu shel can byin/ de ltar gnas su 'dug pa 
389.12(1): la rgyal po stag mgo ra thod bya ba de la stum med pas/ phyag brnyan ma ya gcig gi/
389.13(1): lcags kyi tho ba bsnams/ mtsho bdag gnyan gyi mi gcig srid pa des bzung / rtse 
389.14(1): brag la lam gtod tho ba bzung ste rgyab/ brag lam med la lam gtod/ ri yang rnyil 
389.15(1): la brag kyang ral/ srin po rgyal po'i ltag tu brgyab pas/ zhal nas sgra skad ngan pa 
389.16(1): tsir gyis byung / brag chas ri lung gang sa la 'o dod bos/ brag cha yang dang po der 
389.17(1): srid/ klu srin ma bzod pas mjug ma brag la brdab pa la brag srin du song / sha 
389.18(1): 'bras rus 'bras su song / skran rlung gang byung yang klu srin gyi nad yin/ klu srin 
389.19(1): bkar ba'i yas bsags pa/ gtor ma nyi shu rtsa gcig dang / klu srin gyi shing stag

389.21(1): dbyar pa dag dang stag pa la klu srin gyi gzugs bris/ mi lus ra mgo can sbrul gyi

395.21(1): brtse sems bdag la dgongs su gsol/ e sa bdag lcags mo sbrul gyi gzugs/
396.1(1): mi mgo gsum ni dbu la rgyan du thogs/ lug gi lo la byang gi phyogs na gnas/ lo 
396.2(1): rer rgud kyin lo re langs/ de tshe gdug pa sna tshogs byed/ sbrul gyi gzugs su 
396.3(1): 'dug pa gdug pa che ba'i rtags/ mi mgo gsum ni mnga' zhing rtags dang ldan/

396.5(1): srid la rgol/ 'di 'dra'i gzugs ni mi mthun pa/ sa gzhi mi 'khor dag la gnod

414.17(1): byon cig /sbyin pa chen po'i sems kyis gshegs su gsol/ phrag dog ru nga'i sems 
414.18(1): dang ma byon cig /yangs pa chen po'i sems kyis gshegs su gsol/ log 'dren 
414.19(1): srin po'i sems dang ma byon cig /zhi 'jam lha ngag sems kyis gshegs su gsol/
414.20(1): mi snyan nga ro'i sgra dang ma byon cig /tshangs pa lha yi gsung gis gshegs su gsol/
414.21(1): gnod sbyin 'khrug pa'i sems dang ma byon cig /dgyes shing dga' ba'i sems kyis 
415.1(1): gshegs su gsol/ chog shes med pa'i sems dang ma byon cig /byams pa thugs 
415.2(1): rje'i sems kyis gshegs su gsol/ dgongs pa btang snyoms sems dang ma byon 
415.3(1): cig /mes rgu bskyang zu'i sems kyis gshegs su gsol/ mdza' grogs btang ba'i 
415.4(1): sems dang ma byon cig /bsod nams nor btsas sems kyis gshegs su gsol/
415.5(1): lhag mthong blo gsal sems kyis gshegs su gsol/ g.yu 'brang bdud rtsi chu la 
415.6(1): 'thung zhing gshegs su gsol/ 'phrul ngag bden pa'i bon la nyan zhing byon/ mi 
415.7(1): grangs phyugs kyi rtsis dang dbang thang dang / chung srid spel ba'i sems dang chas te 
415.8(1): byon/ rkyen 'jug god 'jug gcod pa'i don la gshegs su gsol/mdor na dus 
415.9(1): gsum bde gshegs bka' drin la/ sa bdag lha klu gza' dang rgyu skar rnams/
415.10(1): mchod pa'i mgron du spyan 'dren na/ tshong pa rin chen gling du phyin pa ltar/ bsod 
415.11(1): nams rin chen gling du myur bar gshegs su gsol/ rin chen dpag bsam tshul 
415.12(1): du sgyur ba ltar/ mchod sbyin dpag bsam tshul du gshegs su gsol/ lha rnams 
415.13(1): 'dres pa'i tshul du 'dres pa ltar/ longs spyod 'dres pa'i tshul gyis gshegs su 
415.14(1): gsol/ bstan pa bsrung phyir gshegs su gsol/ nad dang rkyen dang 'khrugs pa 
415.15(1): rkyen ngan dang / smra ngan thams cad zhi bar mdzad du gsol/ zhes a rga la sogs 
415.16(1): mchod pa rnams/ bzung la rten gzugs sgyur bcos bya/ phra mo la gang gnod pa ma 
415.17(1): lags pa'i/ spyan 'dren mi 'tshal lo/ /zhes sa bdag spyan drang ba'i le'u ste bcu 
415.18(1): drug pa'o/ //
415.19(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag rnams bzhugs su gsol ba'i le'u la/ 'bru sna dang 
415.20(1): me tog bzung la 'di skad do/ /oM 'jig rten 'di nas mthu dang mnga' bdag sa 
415.21(1): bdag yongs kyi bdag /so so'i yon tan rdzu 'phrul bsam mi khyab/ thams cad 
416.1(1): 'dul ba'i skal mda' dgyes pa'i byin rlabs dang / sa bdag rgyal po btsun mo 
416.2(1): sras dang blon po bcas/ gtsug lag 'dus pa 'phrul gyi dkyil 'khor dam pa 
416.3(1): 'dir/ dgyes shing brtan par bzhugs su gsol/ phyag dang gus bcas mchod pa 
416.4(1): 'bul/ e sems can don la thugs dgongs la/ mthu chen sa bdag klu gnyan ma 
416.5(1): lus 'khor bcas kun/ sna tshogs pad ma'i gdan 'di la/ sa bdag 'khor dang 
416.6(1): bcas pa rnams bzhugs su gsol/e shin tu khro la gtum pa'i gzugs 'chang ba/
416.7(1): gza' chen brgyad po 'khor dang bcas/ nam mkha' bar snang khams na rgyu ba'i rgyu 
416.8(1): skar nyi shu rtsa brgyad 'khor dang bcas/ sa sa so so'i gdan la bzhugs su gsol/
416.9(1): 'bru dang me tog gtor zhing sa bdag bzhugs su gsol ba'i le'u ste bcu bdun 
416.10(1): pa'o// //
416.11(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag rnams la khrus gsol te/ e sems can don la thugs 
416.12(1): dgongs la/ mthu chen sa bdag klu gnyan ma lus kun/ gza' dang rgyu skar 'khor 
416.13(1): dang bcas/ gdan mchog 'di la bzhugs nas kyang / rang 'byung gdod dag 
416.14(1): bdud rtsi ste/ gtsang ma'i tshan chab khrus gsol 'dis/ phyag dang zhabs ni bsil 
416.15(1): nas kyang / rnam rtog mtshan ma'i bag chags dag par shog /'dod chags dbang 
416.16(1): gis mkhon 'gras phog pa dang / zhe sdang dbang gis mkhon 'gras phog pa dang /
416.17(1): nga rgyal dbang gis mkhon 'gras phog pa dang / gti mug dbang gis mkhon 'gras 
416.18(1): phog pa dang / thab gzhob dbang gis mkhon 'gras phog pa dang / mi yi dri mas 
416.19(1): mkhon 'gras 'gos pa dang / lo yi lha la mchod pa dang / bdud rtsi sman gyi gtsang 
416.20(1): tshan dang / ye shes chu rgyun khrus gsol bas/ mkhon 'gras thams cad byang bar 
416.21(1): shog /e mthu chen sa bdag thugs kyi mnga' bdag ni/ pho brang yid 'ong sa bdag 
417.1(1): gzhal yas 'dir/ sa bdag 'khor bcas bzhugs pa la/ yang dag nyid du 
417.2(1): bdag mnga' ba/ bdud rtsi gtsang ma'i tshan chab 'di/ phyag dang zhabs dang zhal

417.5(1): oM a dkar sang sang sa le ye swahA: zhes sa bdag la khrus gsol ba'i le'u ste bco 
417.6(1): brgyad pa'o// //
417.7(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag rnams la phyag 'tshal ba'i le'u la 'di skad do/ /e 
417.8(1): rgya che sa bdag rgyal po rje/ gdags srib chu la dbang sgyur te/ longs spyod dga' 
417.9(1): bde sa bdag dkyil 'khor 'dir/ gshen mched gus pas bstod de phyag 'tshal 
417.10(1): lo/ /'og phyogs sa yi lha mo ba/ klu mo chen po zhi ba ste/ sa bdag chen po 'gro ba 
417.11(1): 'dzin pa'i mchog /sa yi lha mo bstan ma la/ mchod cing bstod de phyag 'tshal lo/ /
417.12(1): 'og gi klu ste sa yi lha/ sa 'dzin lag pa chen po ste/ dam tshig shes pa'i 'khor lo 
417.13(1): sgyur/ mchod cing bstod de phyag 'tshal lo/ /'byung ba lnga yi snying po mchog /ha sa ru 
417.14(1): sbal dkar por sprul/ bar khams brgyad la mnga' mdzad de/ sa la mnga' mdzad 
417.15(1): sa bdag ste/ shing la mnga' mdzad dpyid la phyag 'tshal lo/ /me la dbang sgyur sa 
417.16(1): bdag ste/ drod la mnga' mdzad dbyar gyi khams/ tsha ba'i sa bdag rnams la phyag 
417.17(1): 'tshal lo/ /lcags la mnga' mdzad sa bdag ste/ sra ba'i mnga' bdag ston la 
417.18(1): phyag 'tshal lo/ /rdo'i snying po lcags la mnga' mdzad pa/ mnyes shing bstod de phyag 
417.19(1): 'tshal lo/ /chu khams dgun gyi lha la phyag 'tshal lo/ /phyogs bcu'i sa bdag rnams 
417.20(1): la phyag 'tshal lo/ /ya rabs tshul gyis bstod de phyag 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag kha yan 
417.21(1): bcu gnyis thugs kyi bdag po ste/ sa bdag thams cad spyan sngar 'dir/ bdag 
418.1(1): cag dga' zhing dad pa'i sems byung na/ sa bdag rgyal po btsun mo blon po bcas/
418.2(1): pho nya mngag gzhug zhe khra ci snyed la/ dga' zhing dad pa'i sems kyis ni/ mchod 
418.3(1): sbyin yo byad dkyil 'khor sbyar bshams na/ rab tu mdzes shing gtsang ma'i rdzas 
418.4(1): bshams pa/ lhab lhub dbal dar rgyal mtshan lda ldi dang / yid bzhin sil snyan 
418.5(1): rnga gshang dung slang dang / mdzes shing sdug pa'i rol mo bar tshogs bshams/ mi 
418.6(1): yul dkon pa'i dkor nor sna tshogs bsags/ sems can rgyud 'dzin zhal zas sna 
418.7(1): tshogs bkod/ 'dzin med gtong ldan sems kyi rgya bskyed na/ dga' zhing gus pa'i

419.15(1): sa bdag chen po bcu gnyis kyi/ thugs dang 'gal ba mthol lo bshags/ sems

433.16(1): lag po che la bsngos te thob par mdzod/ gtsug lag 'phrul gyi bon po'i bka' lung 
433.17(1): 'di/ 'dre lnga rgyal pos bzlog pa'i don slad du/ dam rdzas so so'i sgo nas bsags 
433.18(1): pa 'di/ mthu dang rdzu 'phrul mnyam pa so sor mdzad du gsol/ /srin bya phug ron 
433.19(1): pu shud pha wang mgo /yul gdon 'gong po the'u rang dur sri rnams/ gnas dang 
433.20(1): 'dug sa dgon pa'i yul na bskyas btab pas/ ma 'tshe gzhan gyi yul na bskyes su 
433.21(1): btab/ ma 'tshe gzhan gyi yul na spyugs pa'i phyir/ mthu chen sa bdag rgyal po 
434.1(1): 'khor bcas bstod/ sa bdag khyod la gsol 'debs sa bdag bsnyen/ dpung 
434.2(1): brnyan gdug pa gtan du ma mdzad cig /gtad phyung gdon skyung gzhan gyi yul du 
434.3(1): bskul btab bo/ /snad pa'i rman pa dri bcas nad gdon bzlog pa'i phyir/ srid pa'i 
434.4(1): dug sna mang po bsags nas su/ rab 'bar dbal gyi me gzengs dug mtsho khol/
434.5(1): mi bzad tsha ba'i dba' klong phyag rgyas btab nas su/ zhi dang 'dzum pas bdag 
434.6(1): lus khrus bgyis pa/ gdug pa ma dbyung dug kun dag gyur cig /mi tshangs sems 
434.7(1): kyi bag chags sdig pa byang nas kyang / sa bdag 'dzin pa ma mdzad cig /'phrul 
434.8(1): ngag bden pa bon gyi bka' bcos nas/ nam yang sa bdag bden tshig mi bslu 
434.9(1): zhing / rus dgu sna dgu mkhar nag khra bo la/ 'phur dgu 'dzul bcu'i spu gzugs 
434.10(1): brgyan nas su/ phyag rgya rol pa bden pa'i sngags kyis btab/ gnam lcags dbal 
434.11(1): gyi ral gri til mar dar btags pas/ gnyan dgu 'dre dgu'i sdug bsngal byur gyi 
434.12(1): thag bcad na/ dbang chen sa bdag rgyal po bkas bcos pas/ 'dre dang gdon 
434.13(1): dang bgegs la sogs/ bdud dang btsan dang sri dang gcan/ gzhi gsang yon du 
434.14(1): khro bar ma byed cig /sa bdag lha klu'i byad kyang bkrol bar shog /sog mig lcags 
434.15(1): phur btab pa bzhin/ gang gdon rnams kyi gzugs rnams bcings nas kyang /

434.17(1): bar ma gyur cig /'ge'u bse rags shi gshed sa bdag kha bye na/ gnyan sgrul the sha 
434.18(1): nag po rab tu sdoms/ rim pa bco brgyad sa sgo bye na yang / gshin rje rgyal po'i

435.1(1): bde ldan 'dul bas mthu ldan shog /sa bdag dbang chen 'khor dang bcas pa 
435.2(1): rnams la yang / 'di ltar mchod yon gter chen bcas pa 'bul/ gshen rab bon

452.6(1): ber ljang gu mnabs/ dbu la prog zhu ljang gu gsol/ mchod pa'i dam rdzas gtsang 
452.7(1): ma 'di 'bul bas/ skran rlung gi nad dang 'dar ba'i nad dang / rdo dang shu ba 
452.8(1): gzhan pa'i nad dang / smyo 'bog nad dang / khong sbos pa'i nad/ de dag thams 
452.9(1): cad bsgyur du gsol/ e lho phyogs me la mnga' mdzad sa bdag rgyal po la/ na 
452.10(1): bza' mthing ber dkar po gsol/ snying ni me'i khams yin pas/ snying gi mchod pa 
452.11(1): dam rdzas 'di 'bul na/ snying gi nad rnams byang gyur cig /sha ser ba'i nad dang /
452.12(1): khrag tshad stod du 'khrug pa'i nad dang / phung po gdos pa'i nad dang / bud med 
452.13(1): dar ma la phog pa'i nad dang / skyes pa dar ma la phog pa'i dar sri dang / de dag 
452.14(1): thams cad bsgyur du gsol/ e lho nub skye bar mnga' mdzad sa bdag rgyal/ sku 
452.15(1): la na bza' mthing ber dkar po la/ shing lo mdzes pa'i ri mo can/ dbu la prog 
452.16(1): zhu ser po gsol/ pho mcher sa'i khams yin pas/ pho mcher dam rdzas 'di 'bul 
452.17(1): na/ pho mcher na ba dang 'on pa lkugs pa'i nad dang / smyo ba'i nad rnams thams 
452.18(1): cad sgyur/ e nub phyogs lcags la mnga' mdzad sa bdag rgyal po ni/ sku mdog 
452.19(1): na bza' mthing ber nag po la/ shing lo nag po'i ri mo can/ dbu la prog zhu nag 
452.20(1): po gsol/ glo ba lcags kyi khams yin pas/ glo ba'i dam rdzas 'di 'bul bas/ glo 
452.21(1): ba'i nad sha ser ba'i nad khams dang / bud med dar ma la bab pa'i sri dang /
453.1(1): skyes pa dar ma la bab pa'i dar sri dang / de dag thams cad bsgyur du gsol/ e 
453.2(1): nub byang gnam rgyal gangs la mnga' mdzad sa bdag rgyal po la/ na bza' mthing 
453.3(1): ber sku bkra la/ shing lo skya bkra'i ri mo can/ dbu la prog zhu ljang gu gsol/ glo 
453.4(1): ba'i dam rdzas 'di 'bul na/ glo ba'i nad mdze nad dang lhu tshigs kyi nad dang /
453.5(1): rus grul dang sha grul thams cad bsgyur du gsol/ e byang phyogs chu la mnga' 
453.6(1): mdzad sa bdag rgyal po la/ na bza' mthing ber smug po la/ shing lo smug po'i ri 
453.7(1): mo can/ dbu la prog zhu smug po gsol/ mkhal ma chu yi khams yin pa/ mkhal 
453.8(1): ma'i dam rdzas 'di 'bul bas/ mkhal rked kyi nad dang gsang sde chu yi nad dang 
453.9(1): rnge'u skran gyi nad dang / mkhal ma'i nad thams cad bsgyur du gsol/ e byang 
453.10(1): shar skye gnas ri la mnga' mdzad sa bdag ni/ na bza' sngo bkra la/ shing lo sngo 
453.11(1): bkra'i ri mo can/ dbu la prog zhu ser bkra gsol/ pho mtsher sa yi dam rdzas 'di 
453.12(1): 'bul bas/ pho mtsher gyi nad dang skrang rlung nad rnams bsgyur du gsol/ gzhan 
453.13(1): yang dbang phyug bcu gnyis la/ mchod pa dam pa 'di 'bul bas/ mthun pa'i 
453.14(1): bgegs rnams zhi bar gyur cig /sa bdag mi lus stag gi dbu brnyan can/ spor 
453.15(1): ra dgongs kyi sa bdag bsgyur du gsol/ sa bdag mi lus yos bu'i dbu brnyan 
453.16(1): can/ yos bu'i 'gro sa brda than bsgyur du gsol/ sa bdag mi lus 'brug gi dbu 
453.17(1): brnyan can/ ma phyi dur btab ltas ngan bsgyur du gsol/ sa bdag mi lus sbrul 
453.18(1): gyi dbu brnyan can/ byol song ltas ngan bsgyur du gsol/ sa bdag mi lus rta yi

453.20(1): mi lus lug gi dbu brnyan can// ra lug gi ltas ngan bsgyur du gsol/ sa bdag 
453.21(1): mi lus spre'u'i dbu brnyan can/ brdol pa'i kha brdal ngan pa bsgyur du gsol/ sa 
454.1(1): bdag mi lus bya yi dbu brnyan can/ ku co re re'i ltas ngan bsgyur du gsol/ sa

454.4(1): du gsol/ sa bdag mi lus byi ba'i dbu brnyan can/ rtsog nal gyi ltas ngan bsgyur

454.8(1): gzhan yang nyi ma la sogs te/ gza' chen po brgyad gza' yi nad kag dang / ltas 
454.9(1): ngan na tsha 'khrugs lang bsgyur du gsol/ smin drug la sogs rgyu skar nyi shu rtsa brgyad 
454.10(1): kyi keg dang / ltas ngan 'khrugs lang bsgyur du gsol/ rgyal po la sogs pa lha yi 
454.11(1): bu mo sum brgya drug cu rtsa gnyis gto ru bzung du gsol/ e ri rgyal lhun po'i shar 
454.12(1): phyogs na/ shel gyi bang mig sum brgya drug cu bzhugs/ phyag na shel gyi khab skud 
454.13(1): re re bsnams/ rgyu sbyor yon gyi bdag po'i ral ba drub bo gas pa sbyar/ e ri rgyal 
454.14(1): lhun po'i byang phyogs na/ mchod kyi bar sum brgya drug cu'i nang shed nas/ mchod 
454.15(1): kyi bu mo sum brgya drug cu bzhugs/ phyag na mchod kyi khab skud re re bsnams/ rgyu

454.17(1): ba'i lha lags pas/ yon bdag gzhon mtha' 'phel bar mdzod/ lho phyogs bsod 
454.18(1): nams me ltar 'bar ba'i lha lags pas/ yon gyi bdag po bsod nams 'phel 
454.19(1): byed me ltar 'bar bar mdzod/ byang phyogs nor gyi bang mdzod lha lags pas/ yon 
454.20(1): gyi bdag po nor gyi bang mdzod stsal du gsol/ mgon pa'i bang mdzod rgyud spel du 
454.21(1): gsol/ bkra shis sa bdag bsgyur bcos brtsan zhes gsungs/ 'phrul ngag bden 
455.1(1): tshig mi bslu ba'i/ gser dang rin chen zhal bu 'di/ legs pa'i rtags su ston 
455.2(1): mdzad pa/ 'dre lnga stobs kyis der bzhes te/ bden pa'i tshig ni 'khrul pa na/ nyes

455.11(1): 7 da 'di nas mar sa bdag rnams la sil snyan rnga gshang gi mchod pa 'bul

455.17(1): dgun gyi mgo la byung / sku mdog sngo la 'od zer 'phro/ phyag mtshan g.yas na ba

456.1(1): bsnams/ bdag cag dad pas spyan 'dren na/ 'phrul ngag bon gyi bden tshig ma

459.3(1): po brgyad ma nor sbyor ba'i 'od chen po dgongs su gsol/ gto ni gtsug lag

460.12(1): drug cu rtsis phyin par srid/ tha ma phyag rgya zin gyis bskor ba'i nang shed na/ shel gyi

460.16(1): bdag dang yon bdag gi gus pa'i sgo nas phyag 'tshal bas/ gshen sde mi grangs

460.19(1): srid/ tha ma phyag rgya khon gyi bskor ba'i nang shed na/ shel gyi mi pho dkar po gcig 
460.20(1): gnas te/ des kyang khen gnam la ni pha byas/ khon sa la ni ma byas/ lo khri dang 
460.21(1): 'bum bgrangs/ phyag na shel gyi 'khar ba dkar po bsnams/ shel gyi gnyir ma bco 
461.1(1): brgyad gral du bsgrig /sku lus skyibs dgu bar byed pa'i mi rgan sum brgya drug cus 
461.2(1): bskor te bzhugs/ de ni mi tshe bsring ba'i sa bdag yin/ de la bdag dang yon 
461.3(1): bdag gis gus pa'i sgo nas phyag 'tshal mchod yon 'bul zhing skyabs su mchi'o/ /
461.4(1): mi rnams kyi sku tshe ring bar mdzod/ nad med phyug por gyur pa'i sa bdag ni/ nyi ma 
461.5(1): nub phyogs mtshams shed na/ shel smug nag gi mkhar nang na/ tha ma phyag rgya khon 
461.6(1): gyis bskor ba'i nang shed na/ ku lang shel gyi rgad po gcig /khen pa la ni pha byas/
461.7(1): khon sa la ni ma byas/ srid pa g.yung drung mi gcig ni srid/ des na gnam nas 
461.8(1): mar khu'i char yang phabs/ sa la phyag phye ngad du ldan/ dgun dpyid la ni bdud rtsi 
461.9(1): thang ma g.yas dang g.yon du bdal/ dbyar ston la ni bdud rtsi thang ma sngun du 
461.10(1): bdal/ dpyid la bdud rtsi thang ma rgyab tu bdal/ zas su bdud rtsi za/ sku la na 
461.11(1): tsha med/ sha lhag dang rus lhag med/ 'khor de la shel gyi bud med rgan mo sum 
461.12(1): brgya drug cus bskor te bzhugs/ de ni nad med phyug po'i sa bdag yin/ bdag 
461.13(1): dang yon gyi bdag pos phyag 'tshal mchod 'bul skyabs su gsol bas/ mi rnams 
461.14(1): nad med phyug par mdzod/ gra gdon thul ba dang rkyen mjug bcad pa'i sa 
461.15(1): bdag yin/ nyi ma byang shar mtshams shed na/ lcags kyi brag sum brgya drug cu'i 
461.16(1): nang shed na/ lcags kyi mi rta sum brgya drug cus bskor te bzhugs/ gser gyi mi rta 
461.17(1): sum brgya drug cu 'phros/ lha de rnams la bdag dang yon gyi bdag pos phyag 'tshal 
461.18(1): mchod 'bul skyabs su gsol bas/ rkyen chen po'i mjug ma bcad pa dang dgra 
461.19(1): thub pa'i dpung mdzad du gsol/ gdon thub pa'i lha mdzod cig /sa bdag srid 
461.20(1): slongs kyi lha bcu gnyis la phyag 'tshal lo/ /shel gyi me long dkar po bltams pa 
461.21(1): 'dra ba srid/ rdzu 'phrul gyi mthong ba'i lha yin/ de la bdag cag gshen sdes/ phyag 
462.1(1): 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul bas/ spyan gyis bzang mdzes mthong bar shog /gser gyi 
462.2(1): mchod rten bcu gnyis ltam pa 'dra/ bar srid na rdzu 'phrul ljags kyi lha yin pas/
462.3(1): de las bdag cag gshen sdes phyag 'tshal mchod pa phul bas/ ljags mkhyen dar 
462.4(1): mkhyen par mdzod/ gser gyi rnga gshang sgrol ba 'dra ba srid na rdzu 'phrul gyi sgra skad 
462.5(1): thos pa'i lha yin/ de la bdag cag gshen sdes phyag 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul bas/
462.6(1): rna ba sgra snyan thos par mdzod cig /gser gyi gling gnyis snga pas 'dra ba srid na/
462.7(1): skad rdzu 'phrul gyi gdangs thog pa'i lha yin/ de la bdag dang yon bdag gis phyag 
462.8(1): 'tshal mchod pa phul bas/ sgra snyan skad dang ldan par mdzod cig /'tshal bcu 
462.9(1): gnyis yur du drangs pa 'dra ba srid na/ phung po la gnyan par byed pa'i lha yin/ de 
462.10(1): la bdag dang yon bdag gis phyag 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul bas/ phung po gnyan 
462.11(1): dang ldan par gyur cig / /dngul gyi spre'u dkar po gyen du drangs ba 'dra bar srid na/

462.13(1): mchod pa phul bas/ nor bzang po lag tu 'ong bar mdzod cig /sbrul dkar po 
462.14(1): 'dra bar bcu gnyis srid na/ de na bang mdzod nang na gdon mi zhugs pa'i lha yin/
462.15(1): de la bdag dang yon bdag gis phyag 'tshal mchod pa phul bas/ bang mdzod nang 
462.16(1): na gdon mi zhugs par mdzod cig /shel gyi sgo bcu gnyis bltams pa 'dra ba srid 
462.17(1): na/ thugs ye shes ston pa'i lha yin/ de la bdag dang yon bdag gis phyag 'tshal 
462.18(1): zhing mchod pa phul bas/ thugs la rig pa ye shes shar bar mdzod cig /ru sbal 
462.19(1): dkar po'i tshigs mig gcig tu bsgril te gshibs pa 'dra bar srid na/ sa bdag 
462.20(1): yon bdag lhu tshigs 'brel ba'i lha yin/ de la bdag dang yon gyi bdag pos phyag 
462.21(1): 'tshal zhing mchod pa phul bas/ yan lag lhu tshigs 'brel par mdzod cig /de 
463.1(1): ltar sa bdag dbugs kyi 'byin pa'i lha la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag rdzu 'phrul rkang 
463.2(1): mgyogs kyi lha la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag kha dgu'i lha la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sa

463.6(1): gnyis lha la phyag 'tshal lo/ /shar phyogs shing khams ma mnan na shing rang khar song 
463.7(1): ste rtsi shing skye ba'i yul med/ der sems can gyi gnas med/ shing bdag gi sgo ni sa

463.10(1): sgo ma mnan na/ me rang khar song ste khams brgyad mes tshig pas rtsi shing nags tshal 
463.11(1): skye ba'i yul med/ srid pas srid du med sems can gnas med/ me bdag sgo ni sa

463.13(1): sbrul gyi sprul pa gser gyi dbu can gyis mnan no/ /me shel gyi bsgyur bzhag /rdo brag 
463.14(1): lcags su sbub/ nub lcags khams kyi sgo ma mnan na/ lcags rang khar 'gro ste/ skye 
463.15(1): ba ci srid bdud du thal/ lcags bdag gi sgo ni/ sa bdag spre'u'i sprul pa gser gyi 
463.16(1): dbu can gyis mnan no/ /byang phyogs 'byung ba chu khams kyi sgo ma mnan na/ chu rang 
463.17(1): khar byung ba ste/ ri rab lhun po yang rgya mtsho'i nang du byings/ mtsho lang ling skye bas 
463.18(1): shing bcad/ chu bdag gi sgo ni sa bdag phag gi sprul pa gser gyi dbu can gyis 
463.19(1): mnan no/ /chu srubs kyi sgo ni sa bdag byi ba'i sprul pa gser gyi dbu can gyis 
463.20(1): mnan no/ /nyi ma lho nub kyi mtshams na gshed rdo'i sgo ma mnan na/ rdo yang brag tu 
463.21(1): song ste/ rdo bdag gi sgo ni sa bdag lug gi sprul pa gser gyi dbu can gyis mnan 
464.1(1): no/ /byang nub mtshams na gnam gshed sgo ma mnan na/ gnam sa'i bar mtshams

470.13(1): ju tse rgyal po des rgya mtsho gting mtha' med pa'i pha rol na/ nor bu rin po che'i 
470.14(1): gling khams der ta zig gi tshong pa mang po khrid de/ phar 'gro ba'i chas rgya mtsho la gru 
470.15(1): bcas te gting du phyin pa'i ba thags btags/ zur bzhir phyogs dang mthun pa'i 
470.16(1): dar bzhi btsugs rlung der skyabs skyod cing 'gro ba la/ rlung des rdzing chol na khro 
470.17(1): chu srong stong brdungs pa'i pha bong gting rdo chen po bzhi/ lcags thags kyi btags 
470.18(1): nas rgya mtsho'i gting du bsgyur te btang ba la/ glang la phog pas/ chu srin rgyal 
470.19(1): ba khros pa'i ko long rtsub pas mi dang klu gnyan dang po de ltar 'gras nas chu srin 
470.20(1): rgyal ba'i ga re chu bdag klu'i pha gang yin byas pa la/ chu bdag klu dang sa bdag 
470.21(1): gnyan gyi zhal nas kyang nged kyi pha ni ge'u shan ti ri bdun gyi pha rol na/ shel gyi 
471.1(1): brag them sum brgya drug cu la g.yung drung mkhar thabs ye nas srid/ shel gyi glang 
471.2(1): bu stag ris shig mchis pa de/ nged kyi pha yin gsungs pa dang / chu srin rgyal bas 
471.3(1): 'di skad gsungs/ khyod kyi pha de yin na/ rgya ju tse rgyal po'i glang ru gnyer gsum 
471.4(1): du ma phyin gong bsad nas gum song / khrag phul du skal te 'thung sha srang la 'jal 
471.5(1): te zos/ rus pa rdo la bcag ste mur/ rwa la gzhu byas pags pa la bse byas/ zhes 
471.6(1): dbyen byas nas/ sa bdag klu gnyan rnams thugs khros nyag pa zhes la/ zhe bzhin 
471.7(1): du mun nag bzlog rgya ju tse sha la snyun zhugs par/ sha 'bras dmar ru byung / rdo la 
471.8(1): gnyan 'khrug pas rus 'bras dkar ru byung / chu la klu 'khrugs pas khrag la klu nad 
471.9(1): zhugs/ rtsi shing la gnyan 'khrugs pas rgya ju tse rgyal po'i sha ni sha sar skam/ khrag ni

471.11(1): pa'i snyan 'on/ smra ba'i lce lkugs/ lo bdun lon nas zhag bdun na 'chi ba'i dus 
471.12(1): btab/ de'i dus su lha gshen gto rgyal kong tse la/ gto dang dpyad gsol/ rgya 
471.13(1): skad du a 'gu sha/ bod skad du/ glang dkar po gcig /dka' ba mi la btsal/ sra 
471.14(1): ba brag la brkos/ spu 'go rin gyis nyos/ de nas ba glang dkar po bshas/ rlung 
471.15(1): nyi ma byang shar mtshams su 'gro ba'i nyin par bsur chen po btang / sgam khyer pha 
471.16(1): wang gis lo tsA byas/ shing yongs 'du sa brdol gyi khar bya khyung ka ru na'i snang ba 
471.17(1): blan pa ni gsur bro ba ste/ bya khyung gi bdud rtsi ba glang gi sha yin te/ bya khyung gi phyag 
471.18(1): rgya bcas nas spyan drangs bas bya khyung yang gsol phyir 'ongs/ rtsi shing mdzes sdug 
471.19(1): dang gser g.yu rin po che dang spos dang me tog dang / chu srin 'bar ba'i sder mo 
471.20(1): can de rnams phul nas/ rtsi dang sman gyi gsol bas/ mnol ba dri zhim spos bsang 
471.21(1): na sman gyis gso/ chad pa ni 'phro ru sbyar/ ral pa srubs su drub/ yo ba thig gis 
472.1(1): bsrang / mkhon gcugs ni sbyangs/ phra ma ni byang / mi dang sa bdag klu gnyan 
472.2(1): bsdum pa de ltar srid/ de ring yon gyi bdag pos/ sa bdag klu gnyan dang 'gras 
472.3(1): pa de ltar bsub/ chu bdag klu dang 'gras pa de ltar bsdum/ da yang mi dang sa 
472.4(1): bdag chu bdag klu dum nas sman dang rin po che phul bas 'dum zhing mnyes par 
472.5(1): gyur cig /klu'i gdug rtsub na tsha thams cad zhi bar gyur cig /klu nad mi 'bebs 
472.6(1): pa dang klu dal phyugs la mi 'bebs par gyur cig /gzhung dang mthun pa'i mchod

472.9(1): rtsa dgu pa'o/ //

472.11(1): bdag mi ru 'gras pa bsdum pa ci ltar srid/ rgyal po gson gyi tshe bud med sdug 
472.12(1): brlag cig srid/ bskal pa de'i dus tsam na/ ju tse ma grong rgya gnas yang / gnyan 
472.13(1): ri stod nas mi bshu bar byas/ thang rtses kar mi drang bar byas/ gzung rtse phrag la 
472.14(1): mi gtad par byas/ gnyan gyi skyed mo tshal na shing mi bcad par byas/ gnyan gyi 
472.15(1): chu mig gong mar chu mi bcu/ dus gcig tu bud med ces bya ba de thugs su gdon 
472.16(1): zhugs pas/ gnyan ri stod nas bshus thang rtses kar drangs/ gzung rtse brag la 
472.17(1): gtad/ gnyan gyi skyed mo tshal na shing yang bcad gnyan gyi chu mig sum brgya drug 
472.18(1): cu'i dbus na chu bcus/ zhing rmo chu bcus ma shis pa dang / sa bdag ho ban nag 
472.19(1): po'i lus po mig gi gang ba'i phyogs na rko chu gnyan gyi bang mdzod dbus na mkhar 
472.20(1): las byas/ rdo rang ma shis nas gnyan rdo ma bgrang bas drangs/ bag ma bsu bskyal 
472.21(1): ma shis pas sa bdag the khyim btsun mo'i phyogs su bag sna bstan/ bud med bag 
473.1(1): sna bskyal ma shis pas/ gnyan ljang gu cha gang la bag ma sna phog /pha mes dur 
473.2(1): btab ma shis pas/ sa bdag thes rgyal ba'i steng du dur btab/ sa bdag lha klu 
473.3(1): dang 'gras pa'i skyon gyis/gshen po ni sgur por song ba yang sa bdag gnyan dang

489.21(1): phyar lha rnams kyi bos na lha yis mchod pa phul zhing / skar ma bcos pa'i mkhos

492.16(1): 7 da 'di na sa bdag mchod pas mnyes shing gdon zhi ba'i le'u la/ e ye

492.21(1): brgya drug cu thugs la shar ba sems can dbul phong bkres skom nyam thags rnams

498.12(1): gzhob 'dre re re sbrag /so so'i phyogs mi nor bar bzhag /de ltar gshen pos rig

498.14(1): mchod pa'i rdzas/ 'dod yon mchod pa kun tshang ba/ dbang chen sa bdag rnams 
498.15(1): la 'bul lags kyis/ thugs rjes dgongs la bzhes su gsol/ dme'i rnam rtog 
498.16(1): zhi bar gyur cig /nal gyi rnam rtog zhi bar gyur cig /thab gzhob rnam rtog zhi bar 
498.17(1): gyur cig /dug gi rnam rtog zhi bar gyur cig /klu gnyan gyi rnam rtog zhi bar gyur

498.19(1): cig /chags nyams smas 'am rnam rtog zhi bar gyur cig /ces sa bdag gi dkyil 
498.20(1): 'khor bshams/ 'dod yon rdzas bsags pas/ gdon thub cing non pa'i le'u ste 
498.21(1): zhe gcig pa'o//
499.1(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag ma lus gus pa'i sgo nas mchod pa 'bul ba'i le'u la/
499.2(1): dbang sa bya la 'di skad do/ /e rgyal chen sa bdag dbang chen 'khor dang bcas/
499.3(1): gtsang mar spyod pa'i gza' dang rgyu skar 'khor dang bcas/ bdag sa srib sa chu 
499.4(1): lam dag la brten pa'i lha/ pha bong sa skyer gad pa shir chag dag la gnas pa'i sa 
499.5(1): bdag dang / skyabs dang 'tsho rdzi mdzod pa'i lha thams cad kyang / bdag la gsan 
499.6(1): cing dgongs su gsol/ longs spyod dga' bde yod pa'i sa bdag thugs dang 
499.7(1): 'thad pa'i dkyil 'khor bde chen bshams/ gser gyi me long mdangs gsal phyis/
499.8(1): mda' gzhu dang ral gri mdung gis rgyan gyis brgyan/ srid pa'i zhal zas 'dod yon 
499.9(1): sna tshogs bshams/ shin tu yid 'ong thugs dgyes dkyil 'khor 'dir/ mchod 
499.10(1): gtor 'di la spyan 'dren gshegs su gsol/ thugs rjes dgongs nas bzhes su 
499.11(1): gsol/ bzhes nas rab tu dgyes par mdzod/ de skad bya la gam shing gang gi phyag 
499.12(1): rgya bca' la/ zhal nas sngags 'di brjod par bya'o/ /na ma b+hu tha ya ku ra ma la ma 
499.13(1): 'dzi ye dul dul ta phaTaHswahA/ mi grol sum cu pa/ ta da mi spyi rgyu/ spyi bo tshang tshing /
499.14(1): khar bu chang ling / oM ri ti ni phaTaH phaTaH ta li/ zhes brjod la phyag rgya ni gung mo 
499.15(1): gnyis mnan gcig gi steng du gcig bsnol/ mdzub mo gnyis brkyangs la gyen du 
499.16(1): bsgreng / mthe bong gnyis rtse sprad la mdzub mo'i rtse mnan/ lha klu sde brgyad la phyag rgya 
499.17(1): chen po 'di bstan pas/ phyogs bcu kun nas mchod rdzas ma lus thogs pa grangs 
499.18(1): med par bsam/ de ltar bzlas nas sa bdag chen po rnams la 'di skad gsol 
499.19(1): pa/ de la gtsug lag 'phrul gyi bka' sgo na/ zhib tu gzhan la phab cing brtag pa 
499.20(1): las/ bdag cag sems can skye 'gro thams cad ni/ dus bzhir 'khor lo sgyur ba'i 
499.21(1): rgyal po khyod la/ ma skyes pa dang khyod kyis ma srid pa ni gcig kyang med/ dbang 
500.1(1): chen lha lnga la mi brten pa gcig kyang med/ de la dbang chen lha lnga ni sa chu me rlung 
500.2(1): gi nam mkha' lnga yin/ de la mi brten yang bon nyid dbyings chen la brten/ ma 
500.3(1): la brten yang bon nyid dbyings chen la brten/ dus bzhi 'khor lo sgyur ba'i rgyal 
500.4(1): po yis mi bskyed pa gang yang med/ bdag cag sems can mi'i lus la yang nam 
500.5(1): zla dus bzhi tshang ste/ bdag cag yang la la zhig ni nam zla dbyar gyi bu/ la la 
500.6(1): zhig ni nam zla ston gyi bu/ la la zhig ni nam zla dgun gyi bu yin te/ de la so sor 
500.7(1): dbang tshad re re yod do/ /de la dpyid kyi bu ni shing la dbang / dbyar gyi bu ni me 
500.8(1): la dbang / ston gyi bu ni lcags la dbang / dgun gyi bu ni chu la dbang / tha chung 
500.9(1): bzhi'i bu ni sa la dbang / 'byung ba chen po lnga la dbang bas/ don snying smad lnga 
500.10(1): lus la chags pa lags/ smad lnga yang mchin pa 'byung ba shing gi khams su gtogs/
500.11(1): snying 'byung ba me'i khams/ glo ba 'byung ba lcags kyi khams/ mkhal ma 'byung ba 
500.12(1): chu'i khams/ mtsher pa 'byung ba sa'i khams/ de la lus kyi mdun ni shar rgyab ni 
500.13(1): nub/ g.yas ni lho g.yon ni byang / g.yas ni bla g.yon ni 'og /snga dro dpyid nyi ma 
500.14(1): dros dbyar/ nyi ma myur ston/ nyi ma nub dgun gyi khams su gtogs pa lags/ de 
500.15(1): ltar lo gcig la dus tshod bcu gnyis dang / dus tshod bcu gnyis la zhag gcig /
500.16(1): zhag sum cu ni zla ba gcig /zla ba bcu gnyis la lo gcig /lo gcig la zhag sum 
500.17(1): brgya drug cu/ za ma bdun brgya nyi shu mchis/ de la lo'i dang po byi ba zla ba'i dang po 
500.18(1): dpyid zla ra ba/ zhag gi dang po nam langs pa/ gza'i dang po nyi ma skar ma'i dang 
500.19(1): po smin drug /'dis tshe srog srid du 'byung ste/ dbang thang 'phel grib dang tshe ring 
500.20(1): thung la sogs kyis/ srid pa 'phrul gyi mi g.yung drung sems dpas mdzad/ so so'i 
500.21(1): phyogs mtshams ma nor ba zhig mi 'khrugs par spyad pa las sems can mi'i 'dod 
501.1(1): pa srid/ 'phel sdud ni rang rgyal dang 'dod dgu la zhen nas rtsi shing dang sa rdo la

502.1(1): ba'i le'u ste zhe gnyis pa'o// //
502.2(1): 7 da 'di nas mar ni dang po btsas pa'i dus tshod ni ngan pa bcos pa'i phyir/

507.1(1): 'thad pa'i mchod pa 'bul ba'i le'u ste zhe drug pa'o// //
507.2(1): 7 da 'di nas mar ni sa bdag dkor 'bul ba'i le'u la/ e pho brang yid 'ong 
507.3(1): lha'i gzhal mchog ste/ sa bdag gzhal yas bde chen bkra gsal 'dir/ dbang 
507.4(1): chen sa bdag 'khor dang bcas/ gza' dang rgyu skar skyong ba'i lha/ spyan 'dren 
507.5(1): bzhugs gsol mchod pa 'bul/ ci ltar 'dod pa'i phrin las bcol/ lhas ni mi la 
507.6(1): gnod pa'i las byas na/ 'dre gdon rtsad gcod dkor 'bul 'tshal/ shar phyogs 
507.7(1): sa bdag dbang chen gyi phyag tu g.yu 'brug sngon po 'bul/ lho phyogs sa bdag

507.9(1): phyag tu dngul stag dkar po 'bul/ sa bdag dbang chen byang phyogs chu sbrul nag 
507.10(1): bkra 'bul/ dbus kyi sa bdag phyag tu gser sprel ser po 'bul/ so so sa sar 
507.11(1): rang rang gi phyag 'tshal 'di bzhes la/ srid pa rtags kyi sa bdag bsgyur bcos 
507.12(1): legs par mdzod/ g.yu 'brug sngon mo phyag tu stag gi sbar mo 'bul/ me bya dmar 
507.13(1): po'i phyag tu gzig gi mgo bo 'bul/ dngul stag dkar po'i phyag tu dred kyi thal mo 
507.14(1): 'bul/ chu sbrul nag po'i phyag tu gong du sbar zhog 'bul/ gser sprel ser po'i phyag 
507.15(1): tu ru mtshon khra bo 'bul/ bzhugs na za 'og spre'u yang bsngos te mchod pa 'bul/
507.16(1): phye 'phur na men gdan kyang bsngos te mchod pa 'bul/ na bza' gdan kyang bsngos 
507.17(1): te mchod pa 'bul/ la ber prog zhu dag kyang bsngos te mchod pa 'bul/ spyan 
507.18(1): 'dren dar dkar yol ba dag kyang bsngos te mchod pa 'bul/ 'di dag bzhes na

517.9(1): bslus pa dang / srung ba dang mkhas btsun can la snyad btags pa dang / mthu 
517.10(1): dman dang nyam thag la rku phrog byas pa dang / mdza' bo sgyu gsog gis gzhan gyi

545.2(1): dang / nub phyogs lcags la mnga' mdzad sa bdag yab yum dang / byang phyogs 
545.3(1): chu la mnga' mdzad sa bdag yab yum dang / dbus phyogs sa la mnga' mdzad sa 
545.4(1): bdag yab yum dang / gnyan sbrul thing sha nag po dang / de ltar dbang chen sa 
545.5(1): bdag ma lus 'khor dang bcas pa la/ longs spyod dkor cha sna tshogs dang / gser 
545.6(1): dang za 'og dar dkar dang / rin chen 'bru sangs sna dgu dang / shog shog dong tse 
545.7(1): la sogs pa'i mchod pa 'di 'bul bas/ sa bdag gi gdug pa thams cad zhi bar 
545.8(1): gyur cig /chu la mnga' mdzad pa'i klu'i rigs dang / dmangs rigs dang / rje'u 
545.9(1): rigs dang / bram ze'i rigs dang / gdol pa'i rigs la sogs te/ klu chen brgyad 
545.10(1): dang / mal dros mtsho mo rol pa 'di/ mtsho sing ha la'i mtsho mo dang / 'byung ba 
545.11(1): chen po kha la snyoms pa'i klu dang / de rnams la klu sman sna tshogs mchod pa ni/ snying 
545.12(1): gi zho sha dang / zla gor zho sha dang / gnyan bor zho sha dang / a ru ra dang / skyu ru ra 
545.13(1): dang / dbang po lag pa dang / chu srin sder mo dang / a ru ra dmar po dang / du 
545.14(1): ru ka dang / dza ti pha la dang / mngar sna dang / klu'i mchod pa sna tshogs phul bas/
545.15(1): klu byang chub sems dang ldan par gyur cig /klu'i gnas dga'o/ /'dzin rtog gi blo 
545.16(1): grol lo/ /dga' ba btang snyoms kyi sems dang ldan par gyur cig /de ltar klu la 
545.17(1): 'dod yon mchod pa 'di 'bul bzhes/ 'bul ba bdag gis mi nor la/ bzhes pa 
545.18(1): khyod kyis ma nor zhig /de bas bskyod do/ /klu rnams gnas su bskyod do/ /ye nas 
545.19(1): bskyod pa ma lags te/ slar yang sems can don la thugs rjes dgongs/ drin 
545.20(1): lan thugs rjes dgongs su gsol/ de'i gnod pa ma mdzad byams sems bskyed/
545.21(1): rgyu skar smin drug la 'bru sna dang / dar sna 'di mchod pa 'bul/ snar ma la gser 
546.1(1): rnying mchod pa 'bul lo/ /mgo ni mi bzang gnam gyi skar ma yin/ sna skar ngan pa 
546.2(1): dang bsu skar ngan pa srid la rku ba'i shi skar ngan pa bgegs su ldang na/  mda' 
546.3(1): gzhu phul bas bcos/ lag ni dme lag kha po snying khrag dmar po zlo bas/ bsu 
546.4(1): ba'i skar ma ldang ba dang / gtong ba'i skar ma ldang ba dang / btsas pa'i skar ma 
546.5(1): ldang ba dang / dus tshod ngan pa ma zer ma bzlo zhig /gza' skar ngan pa ma zer ma 
546.6(1): bzlo zhig /bye'u sna tshogs kyis bcos so/ /nabs so stong khams la dbang byed pa 
546.7(1): dang / mi phyugs la gnod pa che bas/ khyi thod kyis bcos so/ /rgyal g.yu 'brug sngon 
546.8(1): po/ gnam the'u sngon po phyag brnyan du gtong ba ste gser gyis bcos so/ /skag thal 
546.9(1): mdog ngan pa sna tshogs 'chang ba ni/ ba le dung gis bcos so/ /rgyu sbyor yon bdag 
546.10(1): 'khor dang bcas pa la/ na tsha gdug rtsub ma byed cig /shar gyi skar ma bdun 
546.11(1): bzhugs la/ 'dod yon mchod pa 'di 'bul bas/ 'bul ba bdag gis mi nor 
546.12(1): la/ bzhes pa khyod kyis ma nor zhig /bskyod do shar phyogs gling la bskyod/ ye nas 
546.13(1): bskyod pa ma lags te/ slar yang sems can don la thugs rjes dgongs/ thugs 
546.14(1): dam dbang gis snyan ma sra/ drin lan thugs rjes dgongs su gsol/ de tshe gnod 
546.15(1): pa ma byed byams sems bskyed/ mchu ni mi bzad gnam khyi nag po ste/ khal du 
546.16(1): bkol ba re'u yis bcos so/ /gre dur sri nag po la/ mi la gnod pa ma byed cig /
546.17(1): 'jag rtas bcos/ dbo rlung gi 'khor lo zhon ba ste phag gis bcos so/ /me bzhi 
546.18(1): gnam gyi bdud gcod pas na/ khra dang 'ug pas bcos so/ /nag pa bya mig dri 
546.19(1): khams kyi skar ma ste/ bya rog dang byi tshang gis bcos so/ /sa ri klu bdud skar ma ste/
546.20(1): bya mos bcos so/ /sa ga g.yung drung khyim bdun skar mar thod kyis bcos so/ /lho 
546.21(1): phyogs skar ma bdun bzhugs pa la/ 'dod yon mchod pa 'di 'bul bas/ 'bul 
547.1(1): ba bdag gis mi nor la/ bzhes pa khyod kyis ma nor zhig /bskyod do lho phyogs gling 
547.2(1): la bskyod/ ye nas bskyod pa ma lags te/ slar yang sems can don la thugs rjes 
547.3(1): dgongs/ thugs dam dbang gis snyan ma sra/ drin lan thugs rjes dgongs su 
547.4(1): gsol/ de tshe gnod pa ma byed byams sems bskyed/ lha mtshams 'phrul 'gyed skar 
547.5(1): ma cho los bcos so/ /snrubs snol sbar mo sbyin len gyi skar ma ste/ bya bang dang ngar 
547.6(1): mis bcos so/ /chu stod chu smad sa 'dzin lag can skar ma ste/ sa the'u nag po'i 
547.7(1): gnod pa gtong ba bra bas bcos/ byi bzhin gnod pa sna tshogs kyi skar ma ste/ mi 
547.8(1): phyugs la gnod par byed pa pho thang gis bcos so/ /gro bzhin nub phyogs skar ma 
547.9(1): bdun po la/ 'dod yon mchod pa 'di 'bul bas/ 'bul ba bdag gis mi nor

547.11(1): bskyod pa ma lags te/ slar yang sems can don la thugs rjes dgongs/ thugs 
547.12(1): dam dbang gi snyan ma sra/ drin lan thugs rjes dgongs su gsol/ de tshe gnod 
547.13(1): pa ma mdzad byams sems bskyed/ mon gre gnam gyi rdo rigs 'phen ba ste/ bya 
547.14(1): byi'u 'bur 'dzul gyis bcos so/ /mon gru sdug bsngal rang thar 'khor ba nya mgos 
547.15(1): bcos/ khrums stod shing sgo'i skar ma ste/ phyi grum gyi thod pas bcos so/ /khrums 
547.16(1): smad sa srin dur byin gyi skar ma ste/ stag ras kyis bcos so/ /nam gru mgyogs ma 
547.17(1): ni zong sna tshogs kyis bcos/ tha skar go mtshon sna tshogs kyis bcos/ bra nye zangs 
547.18(1): sgo ni g.yu'i sgo nga gsum dang / dar mtshon sna tshogs dang / zhal zas sna tshogs 
547.19(1): kyis bcos so/ /byang phyogs skyong ba'i skar ma bdun po la/ 'dod yon mchod pa 
547.20(1): 'di 'bul bas/ 'bul ba bdag gi mi nor ro/ /bzhes pa khyod kyis ma nor zhig /
547.21(1): bskyod do byang phyogs gling la bskyod/ ye nas bskyod pa ma lags te/ slar yang 
548.1(1): sems can don la thugs rjes dgongs/ thugs dam dbang gis snyan ma sra/ drin 
548.2(1): lan thugs rjes dgongs su gsol/ de tshe gnod pa ma mdzad byams sems bskyed/
548.3(1): de ltar skyong ba'i gza' skar 'khor dang bcas pa ni bsu ba'i skar ma ngan pa dang /

548.5(1): ma ngan pa dang / na ba'i skar ma ngan pa dang / stor ba'i skar ma ngan pa ma zer

548.9(1): 7 da 'di nas sa bdag bskyod de phyag rgyas btab pa'i le'u la/ gshen po phrin 
548.10(1): las mkhan gyis/ gar stabs lhe'u rje'i 'gros bya/ phyag rgya bsgyur/ gzugs dang 
548.11(1): rten shing mchod pa rnams/ lo mal mthun sbyor gyi phyogs mtshams dag tu bskyal 
548.12(1): lo/ /'di skad ces bka' bstsal to/ /'di kun thub phyag rgya'o/ /de ring gto bsgyur 
548.13(1): gshen po gto la chas/ gar stabs lhe'u rje'i 'gros dang chas/ bka' rtags phyag rgya 
548.14(1): bsgyur zhing chas/ gnam sa'i lha klu gzu dang dpang la btsug /gshen po gto mkhan 
548.15(1): bdag la gnod pa ma byed cig /bdag gi 'byung ba las kyi gto bgyid dpyad 
548.16(1): mdzad na/ srid pa las kyi khog sbyor ro/ /zhal mches mchog gi gzhu bdungs shing /
548.17(1): ser mo na phran mda' ltang sbyar ro/ /da ni bsgyur pa'i gshen po mthu chen te/ shar 
548.18(1): gyi phyogs na bsgyur ba ni/ srid khams rgyal po srid pa'i gnyan/ pha ku rgan sri dbu 
548.19(1): dkar tshe'i phrag dog bsgyur du gsol/ lho phyogs me khams 'byung ba srid pa'i gnyan/
548.20(1): byang phyogs klu'i gnyan/ nye ba'i g.yer ngan bsgyur du gsol/ dbus kyi phyogs nas 
548.21(1): bsgyur ba ni/ kun 'dus lus kyi 'byung ba gso bskyed sa'i gnyan/ dur 'khrugs 
549.1(1): dur mgron bsgyur du gsol/ phyag rgya chen po lnga byung ba ni/ dbus bdud kyi phyag 
549.2(1): rgya 'byung ba ni/ 'byung ba me'i phyag rgya yin/ de la yon bdag mi phyugs 'khor 
549.3(1): bcas rnams/ phyag rgya 'di'i byin rlabs gyis/ tsha ba'i nad rnams bsgyur du gsol/
549.4(1): g.yas kyi sta zur bstan pa ni/ 'byung ba shing gi phyag rgya yin/ phyag rgya chen po'i mthu 
549.5(1): stobs byin rlabs kyis/ yon bdag mi phyugs rnams/ zhi zhing smra lkugs rangs par 
549.6(1): mdzod/ g.yon gyi sta zur bstan pa ni/ 'byung ba lcags kyi phyag rgya yin/ phyag rgya 
549.7(1): chen po de'i mthu stobs byin rlabs kyis/ yon bdag gi ltas ngan thams cad bsgyur 
549.8(1): du gsol/ ltag pa mjing pa bstan pa ni/ 'byung ba chu'i phyag rgya yin/ phyag rgya chen 
549.9(1): po de'i mthu stobs byin rlabs kyis/ 'dre lnga stobs chen bsgyur du gsol/ gshed 
549.10(1): bzhi mthu chen phyag rgyas bsgyur/ bya khyung mthu rtsal khyod kyis zlog /bdud kyi mtshe'u 
549.11(1): phur sna rnon po khyod kyis zlog /lus kyi sgo nas sngags brjod pa/ kha tse hUM/ ngag gi 
549.12(1): sgo nas sngags brjod pa/ che ge hUM/ yid kyi sgo nas sngags brjod pa/ 'gu ba hUM/ kha 
549.13(1): tse hUM/ che ge hUM/ 'gu ba hUM/ lus ngag yid gsum gyi man ngag sngags 'di gsum 
549.14(1): brjod pas/ dbang chen sa bdag ma lus kyi/ gdug rtsub thams cad bsgyur du 
549.15(1): gsol/ snying po brjod pa'i nus mthu yis/ ltas ngan log 'dren kag gnyan dang /
549.16(1): na tsha gdug rtsub dang / 'khrug long thams cad bsgyur du gsol/ dang po srid pa'i 
549.17(1): gnam phub nas/ gnam mtha' lcags kyis bskor/ sa bting skos kyis bting nas/
549.18(1): sa mtha' zangs kyis bskor/ de gnyis bshos pa la/ sras lo'i rgyal po bcu gnyis su 
549.19(1): srid/ de lo'i gshed po bcu gnyis kyis bsgyur/ rgyal po byi ba'i lo la/ bdud kyi rgyal 
549.20(1): po ris ste gong nyag des bsgyur/ bka' rtags kyi phyag rgya dam pos mtshams bcad 
549.21(1): do/ /'greng mi la gnod pa ma byed cig /dud phyugs la god kha ma gtong zhig /

551.16(1): la zhon zhang 'tshubs ma'i nang du 'gro/ sre mo wa lcam pho nyar 'gyed/ bu tsa chung

551.20(1): mgon lha dkar po 'khor dang bcas/ kun kyang sa le dung gi thul pa can/ mtsho 
551.21(1): rog g.yu'i cog zhu dbu la gyon/ phyag na baiDUr+ya'i lcags kyang rdebs/ kyi ling dkar

552.2(1): du ma 'bebs shig /dud phyugs la gcan du ma brdzu zhig /thog ser mda' ltar 
552.3(1): ma 'phen zhig /gnam sgo bcad de/ yams kha bsgyur ro/ /bka' rtags kyi phyag 
552.4(1): rgya dam pos mtshams bcad do/ /e klu'i rgyal po thu bo che/ sbrul mgo stong gi gdeng

552.20(1): do/ /e dus gsum bder gshegs 'khor dang bcas pa la/ gus pas phyag 'tshal 
552.21(1): dang bas skyabs su mchi'o/ /rgyu sbyor yon bdag gshen mched kyis/ sa bdag dang 
553.1(1): mkhon 'gras sbyang ba dang / gshed po bcos pa dang bdud kha bsgyur ba'i don chen 
553.2(1): du/ mchod pa sman dang bcas pa dang / dkor nor rin po che dang / zang zing dar 
553.3(1): zab dbyi spyang gser dngul dang / bal tshon bzang bya spu sdug dang / chan dang 
553.4(1): khur ba dang / spyan gzigs sna dgu dang / zhal zas gtsang mar sbyar ba 'di/ dus 
553.5(1): gsum bder gshegs byin rlabs dang / ston pa gshen rab bden pa dang / lha 
553.6(1): chen tshangs pa'i bden pa dang / drang srong 'od 'bar bden tshig dang / gshen po 
553.7(1): bdag gi ting 'dzin nus mthu yis/ klu gnyan sa bdag gza' skar dang / btsan 
553.8(1): po bdud dang btsun mo dmu/ glang zla ba nyi ma 'phan po skar ma phyug po sprin bzang 
553.9(1): po gzha'/ yul sa gangs ri mtsho mo brag ri dag la gnas pa dang / srid pa'i lo 
553.10(1): skor bcu gnyis la mnga' mdzad pa'i/ sa bdag bcu gnyis gza' skar 'khor 
553.11(1): bcas la/ mchod pa 'bul lo gsol lo sbyin no bzhes su gsol/ mnyes shing tshim 
553.12(1): par gyur cig /dga' zhing mgu bar gyur cig /de ltar tshangs pa'i gtsang rdzas 
553.13(1): gtsang chu dam pa ste/ gtsang zhing dag pa'i mchod pa dang / zhal zas dkor nor

553.15(1): g.yu rgod dang / gza' dgu sbyar ba bda' dgu bshams pa 'di/ gshen pos sngags 
553.16(1): dang phyag rgyas byin gyis brlabs/ bon nyid rnam par dag pa yis/ dag cing gtsang 
553.17(1): mar byas nas ni/ 'gras pa dum mo/ /mnol ba bsang ngo / /'khrugs pa zhi'o/ /nad 
553.18(1): sos par 'gyur ro/ /sa bdag dbang chen khyed rnams la/ bshags byang du gsol 
553.19(1): ba'i mdo ni/ de snga phan chad na/ rgyu sbyor yon bdag gshen mched kyis/ pra rtags 
553.20(1): mo dpyad rnam rtog red/ mi 'tshal ma mkhas dbang gis ni/ ma shes pa la khang las 
553.21(1): byas pa dang / shing dang rmang bting byas pa dang / ma phyung ba dang 'o dod 'bod 
554.1(1): pa dang / thang sha 'gyed pa dang / gshed sna bag sna gtod sna dang / 'khrul pa'i 
554.2(1): las te gshed pha de lo gshed bgam pa dang / gshed kyi bu ste zla gshed 'gum mam/
554.3(1): gshed kyi tsha bo ste zhag gshed 'gum mam/ gshed kyi yang tsha ste/ za ma'i gshed 
554.4(1): 'gum mam/ sa bdag gshed po lcags thog phu shud mgo can ni/ ming sring gnyis 
554.5(1): kyis nal byas pa'i bu yin te/ de nal dang rtsog g.yos la ldang bas/ de rnams 
554.6(1): la de lta bu byas pa dang / de ring phyin chad na bzod par gsol/ rgyu sbyor yon gyi 
554.7(1): bdag po gshen sde yi/ sa bdag gshed po la kha mi che lag mi ring / sa bdag 
554.8(1): gshed po'i pha dang bu 'gum mam/ tsha bo dang yang tsha 'gum mam/ dus gsum bde 
554.9(1): bar gshegs pa ni gzu dang dpang / ston pa gshen rab mi bo dang / dbal chen 
554.10(1): khro rgyal dang / drang srong 'od 'bar dang / lha chen tshangs pa zhal lce gcod ba las 
554.11(1): dral la mkhas pa dang / srid pa'i gzu bo bzhi dang / bskal pa'i dpang po brgyad 
554.12(1): dang / khyed rnams kyi mchod yon dam pa gzu zas dang / dbang skyems 'di bzhes 
554.13(1): la/ mtshams bzhi sa bdag gshed bzhi'i dal kha zlog /yams kha zlog cig /gnam 
554.14(1): gshed bcu gnyis yar la zlog /ya yams mar la ma ldang zhig /ya yams gyes la 
554.15(1): dal kha bkyag go /sa gshed bcu gnyis mar la sgyur cig /ma yams mar la ma 
554.16(1): blta zhig /ma yams dal kha sgyur/ bdud btsan dal kha kun sa sa gnas su sgyur 
554.17(1): cig /zlog cig /gshed bzhi mgron dang / sa mgron bzlog cig /rgan gyi gshed 
554.18(1): gzhon nu'i gshed/ che gshed chung gshed kyi kha bcad do/ /bka' rtags kyi phyag 
554.19(1): rgyas bcad do/ /bdud kha bzlog shi kha bcad do/ /rgan sri chung sri gzhon sri dang /
554.20(1): phung sri rnams kyi kha bcad/ bde bar gshegs pas gzu bcad do/ /dbal chen khro 
554.21(1): rgyal gyi bka' dang / gzu yis gshed kha bcad/ lha chen tshangs pas gsang sngags 
555.1(1): kyi gshed kha bcad do/ /bka' rtags kyi phyag rgya drug cus bcad do/ /god kha'i kha 
555.2(1): bcad do/ /rta sri'i kha bcad do/ /rmang sri'i kha bcad do/ /dal kha'i kha bcad do/ /
555.3(1): yams sgo 'don no/ /gser gyi ljid kyis mnan no/ /lcags kyi 'dzer bus 'dzer 
555.4(1): ro/ /khro chu'i yol bas bcad/ tha ram sil gyis sdam/ sgo mo khrigs kyis 'don/ shar 
555.5(1): phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag kyang / shar kyi phyogs nas bskyod de gshegs/ shar nas 
555.6(1): kha bsgyur ro/ /shar nas kha bsgyur phyin chad na/ yon bdag gshen sde phyogs su tshur 
555.7(1): ma lta/ bdud po kha ste 'greng yug des bsgyur ro/ /dmas sha che po des bsgyur ro/ /
555.8(1): chang nas gser g.yu gser skyems kyis/ shar phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag brdzangs 
555.9(1): btab na/ skyems pa chang bas ngo che med/ sngon mo nas bas 'phel che med/ ba rab 
555.10(1): gser bas rin che med/ mtsho rog g.yu bas 'od che med/ gser skyems skyogs gang 
555.11(1): 'di dag kyang / 'bul lo shar phyogs gshed la 'bul lo/ /'gro ba'i don yin/ bye 
555.12(1): ba'i brdzongs yin/  gshed po phyir la ma khyug pa'i bka' rtags kyi phyag rgya dam pos 
555.13(1): mtshams bcad do/ /shar gshed stag dang yos bu gnyis/ bya spre'u gnyis kyi gshed 
555.14(1): du ma 'bebs shig /gshed du ma brdzu zhig /dal du ma 'bebs shig /zer du ma 
555.15(1): lhung zhig /bcos so shar phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag bcos/ bcad do shar gshed 
555.16(1): kha bcad do/ /lho phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag kyang / lho'i phyogs na bskyod de gshegs/
555.17(1): yon bdag gshen sde phyogs su tshur ma blta/ bdud gtum pa lag ring des sgyur/
555.18(1): bdud rngam pa lag ring des sgyur/ chang dang nas dang gser g.yu gser skyems 
555.19(1): kyis/ lho phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag brdzangs btab na/ skyems pa chang bas ngo che 
555.20(1): med/ sngon mo nas bas 'phel che med/ ba rab gser bas rin che med/ mtsho 
555.21(1): rog g.yu bas 'od che med/ gser skyems skyogs gang 'di dag kyang / 'bul lo 
556.1(1): lho phyogs gshed la 'bul lo/ /'gro ba'i don yin bye ba'i brdzangs yin/ gshen po 
556.2(1): phyir la mi 'khrugs pa'i bka' rtags kyi phyag rgya dam pos mtshams bcad do/ /lho 
556.3(1): gshed rta dang sbrul gnyis yin/ phag byi ba gnyis kyi gshed du ma brdzu zhig /shed du 
556.4(1): ma 'bebs shig /bcos so lho phyogs gshed kyi sa bdag bcos/ bcad do lho gshed

556.6(1): gshegs/ nub na kha bsgyur ro/ /nub na kha bsgyur phyin chad na/ yon bdag gshen

557.21(1): bo can dang / the'u rang gri bo rgyal byin gyi 'dre rnams sna ma 'dren/ 'byung ba rlung

560.11(1): bcad/ gzu dang dpang gi bka'/ nam yang mi dbye mi 'gyur ro/ skar sgo bcad

560.21(1): gsum ma btang zhig /gdug rtsub dal yams sgyur du gsol/ kar rdzi kar rdza/ shar

564.3(1): @#/      /zhang zhung skad du/ na ga de do byo lha zhi ra'o/ /bod skad du/ sa bdag 
564.4(1): 'bum nag zhes bya'o/ /ston pa thams cad mkhyen pa dang / sa bdag kun tu khyab

564.12(1): bdag gi yid kyi khye'u chung gi ston pa la zhus pa/ bon thams cad gzhi dang rtsa ba

566.1(1): pa'o/ /bam po gnyis pa'o// //

567.1(1): 7 yang ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag kun tu khyab pa dang sa yi lha mo 
567.2(1): brtan ma la sogs ma lus rnams bka' zab mo 'di la nyon cig  /sa bdag rnams 
567.3(1): ston pa la me tog sna tshogs phul lo/ lha phyag kun bdun bskor ba dgu byas/ kyai 
567.4(1): ston pa'i thugs rje nyi ma 'dra/ ma rig mun pa sel mdzad pa/ sangs rgyas ston pa 
567.5(1): yang dag sangs rgyas dpon/ bdag chags sa bdag sde tshogs rnams/ smon lam 
567.6(1): dbang gi sangs rgyas sa la gnas/ sa gzhi dag la mnga' mdzad de/ ston pa'i 
567.7(1): bka' la bdag chags nyon/ 'khor gyi sa bdag klu gnyan kun/ gdug sems 
567.8(1): che ba kun la 'tshe/ sngon gyi smon lam las 'phro re/ dus 'dir ston pa'i thugs rje 
567.9(1): yang / sa bdag thams cad bde legs bkod/ sa bdag gdug pa bsal ba'i

567.16(1): gnas so/ bka' nyan ston pa'i le'u ste lnga pa'o// /

567.20(1): bdag rnams 'khrul lo/ /sa bdag gis zhus pa/ bsam pa'i don ci ltar lags/
567.21(1): gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ gzugs dang rga shi la sogs bsam ngan du ma nas/

569.5(1): bka' la bdag chags nyon/ 'khor gyi sa bdag rnams klu gnyan kun/ gdug 
569.6(1): sems che bas kun la 'tshe/ sngon gyi smon lam las 'phro re/ dus 'dir ston pa'i

569.18(1): bdag chags sa bdag sde tshogs rnams/ smon

572.18(1): rnams la/ sdig pa mi dge thams cad spang bar bya/ sa bdag rnams lus ngag yid 
572.19(1): gsum gyis srog gcod pa spang bar bya'o/ /dug lnga'i dbang du ma byin pa de spangs 
572.20(1): nas/ tshul khrims kyi bla na med pa'o/ /sa bdag klu gnyan rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang 
572.21(1): du mi gtsang ba de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du rdzun du smra 
573.1(1): ba de spang bar 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du tshig rtsub mo de spang 
573.2(1): bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du ngag 'khyal de spang bar 'tshal lo/ /

573.4(1): de spang bar 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag rnams 'gro ba rigs drug gi sems can thams 
573.5(1): cad la mngan sems de spang bar 'tshal lo/ /sa bdag rnams dam tshig mthong so 
573.6(1): rnams la gdug sems gtong ba de spang nas/ sa bdag rnams yi dam lha dang ris 
573.7(1): drug sems can la lta ba 'phya ba de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams mi dge ba bcu 
573.8(1): yi tshul de bsrung na khrims de thub nas/ tshul khrims kyi bla na med pa de ni ston pas 
573.9(1): gsungs so/ /bla ma mkha' 'gro bon skyong rnams la nges don rgyab kyi 'phyogs pa de 
573.10(1): spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams nyon mongs dug lnga'i dbang du bden tshig khyad du 
573.11(1): bsad pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du/ ri rab rtse la 
573.12(1): kus 'debs pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du rgya mtsho'i 
573.13(1): nang du dug spyod pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du chu 
573.14(1): bo chen po gal sgyur de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du rtsi 
573.15(1): shing nags tshal la me gtong ba de spang bar bya'o/ /sems can thams cad la rgyu 
573.16(1): dug lnga'i dbang du longs spyod log par ston pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams 
573.17(1): dug lnga'i dbang du sku gdung dang sku gzugs la mnga' smad cing mtshang 'dog pa 
573.18(1): de spang bar bya'o/ sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du gshen rab kyi bka' bcag 
573.19(1): pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du gshen rab kyi zhal skyin 
573.20(1): la sdig pa'i dri ma bsgo ba spang bar bya'o/ sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du mchod 
573.21(1): rten gnyan po rtse nas bshigs pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams nyon mongs 
574.1(1): dug lnga'i dbang du dge ba'i lo tog la sdig pas sad 'beb pa de spang bar bya'o/ /
574.2(1): sa bdag rnams dug lnga'i dbang du dge ba'i tshogs bcags pa de spang bar bya'o/ /
574.3(1): sa bdag rnams rgyu dug sdig po che yi stong 'deb pa de spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag 
574.4(1): rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du mdza' bo lta bu'i bar du dbyen byed pa de spang bar 
574.5(1): bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du gdung ba byed pa ma dang bu bral par 
574.6(1): byed pa spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du sems gsad pa de 
574.7(1): spang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i dbang du sdig pa mi dge ba thams 
574.8(1): cad spang bar bya'o/ /de ltar na sa bdag rnams shes shing rtogs na tshul khrims 
574.9(1): kyi pha rol du phyin pa'o/ /sa bdag khri gtsug rgyal bas smras pa/ e ma ho/ ston pa 
574.10(1): gshen rab kun gyi mgon/ sa bdag rnams la bka' drin che/ ston pas gsungs pa 
574.11(1): tshul khrims te/ de rnams sa bdag bsrung bar byed/ tshul khrims bsrung ba'i le'u 
574.12(1): ste bcu gsum pa'o// //
574.13(1): 7 de nas ston pa gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams bzod pa 
574.14(1): chen po bsgom/ sa bdag khri gtsug gis zhus pa/ bzod pa ci ltar bsgoms/ ston 
574.15(1): pas bka' stsal pa/ zhe sdang gti mug dang nga rgyal dang 'dod chags phrag dog la 
574.16(1): sogs rgyu dug lnga la 'byung ba'i dgra de mi g.yo ba bzod pa bsgom par bya/ ye shes 
574.17(1): lnga yi ngang du bzod pa sgoms/ bzod pa dag la mi dmigs shes shing rtogs nas 
574.18(1): sa bdag rnams bzod pa'i pha rol tu phyin pa'o/ bzod pa bsgom pa'i le'u ste bcu 
574.19(1): bzhi pa'o// //
574.20(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ khri gtsug rgyal ba la sogs sa bdag rnams/
574.21(1): sangs rgyas par 'dod nas/ brtson 'grus spyod par bya'o/ /khri gtsug gis zhus pas/
575.1(1): brtson 'grus bla na med pa ci ltar spyod/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ pha rol du phyin pa 
575.2(1): bcu la brtson nas brtson 'grus kyi bla na med pa'o/ /khri gtsug rgyal ba la sogs sa 
575.3(1): bdag rnams/ brtson 'grus dang ldan nas thar pa thob pa'i 'bras bu sangs rgyas 
575.4(1): so/ /kyai ston pa'i thugs rje nyi ma 'dra/ ma rig mun pa sel mdzad pa/ ston pa lha 
575.5(1): mi yongs kyi mgon/ gshen rab sku la gus par bstod/ sa bdag sde tshogs thams 
575.6(1): cad kun spyi bor gtug la phyag 'tshal lo/ /brtson 'grus kyi le'u ste bco lnga pa'o// //
575.7(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams bsam gtan bsgom par 
575.8(1): bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams kyis zhus pa/ bsam gtan ci ltar bsgom/ gshen rab kyis 
575.9(1): gsungs pa/ gzugs dang rga shi la sogs 'khor ba'i bon rnams dngos po med du 
575.10(1): shes shing rtogs na bsam gtan pha rol tu phyin pa'o/ /sa bdag rnams rgyu dug lnga'i 
575.11(1): dbang du mi tshig pa ye shes lnga yi ngang du bsgom nas/ bsam gtan gyi bla na med 
575.12(1): pa'o/ /sa bdag rnams 'di la rtogs shig /spyod cig bsam gtan le'u ste bcu 
575.13(1): drug pa'o// //
575.14(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ khri gtsug rgyal ba la sogs sa bdag rnams/
575.15(1): stobs bskyed par bya'o/ /sa bdag gis zhus pas/ stobs ci ltar bskyed/ ston pas 
575.16(1): bka' stsal gsungs pa/ gzugs dang rga shi la sogs zil gyis gnon par bya'o/ /
575.17(1): sbyin pa'i 'bras bu la sogs myang 'das kyi byang bar bya'o/ /sa bdag klu gnyan kun 
575.18(1): tu khyab pas zhus pa/ dug lnga'i dgra ru langs nas stobs ci ltar bskyed/ gshen 
575.19(1): rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams gzugs dang rga shi la sogs dug lnga'i 
575.20(1): dgra lang na ye shes lnga yi stobs bskyed par bya'o/ /gzhan yang snang dang rang snang 
575.21(1): dang gdon bgegs dang na tsa dgra ru langs nas khyung chen dang rnga mong glang chen 
576.1(1): gzha' tshon lta bu'i stobs bskyed par bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams kyis zhus/ stobs de 
576.2(1): la gzugs yod dam/ kha dog yod dam ston pas bka' stsal pa/ stobs kyi pha rol 
576.3(1): du phyin pa la/ gzugs med do/ /kha dog med do/ /dngos po med do/ /stobs la 
576.4(1): gzugs dang kha dog dngos po yod na sa bdag rnams 'khrul lo/ /stobs bskyed 
576.5(1): nas sa bdag rnams bla med 'bras bu thob pa'o/ /stobs bskyed pa'i le'u ste bcu 
576.6(1): bdun pa'o// //
576.7(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ khri gtsug la sogs sa bdag rnams snying 
576.8(1): rje'i bla na med pa bskyed do/ /'di la nyon cig /sa bdag rnams kyis zhus pa/ snying 
576.9(1): rje mkhan po la gnas pa yul gang lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ dag pa 
576.10(1): gsal ba shes pa gsum/ snying rje chen po bskyed par bya/ tshad med bzhi dang ldan 
576.11(1): par nges bdag lags sam/ gzhan la snying rje ci ltar bskyed/ sa bdag kun tu 
576.12(1): bzang po yin par ma shes so/ /bdag rang la rang gi thag pa sbrul du mthong pa 'dra/
576.13(1): bdag rang rang 'khrul lo/ /bdag rang rang 'dra ba rang gis shes nas snying rje'i bla 
576.14(1): med du phyin pa'o/ /rigs drug sems can rnams don dam pa ma rtogs pas/ 'gro 
576.15(1): drug gdung ba snying rje'o/ /la la ni skye rga na 'chi bzhi yis sdug bsngal snying rje'o/ /
576.16(1): sa bdag rnams kyis zhus sam/ bdag snying rje ci ltar bsgom/ gshen rab kyis 
576.17(1): bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag nyon cig /'gro ba rigs drug rnams snying rje'i tshad med 
576.18(1): du bskyed nas pha rol snying rje'i pha rol du phyin pa'o/ /sems can skye rga na 'chi bzhi 
576.19(1): yi sdug bsngal la/ snying rje'i tshad med du bskyed nas snying rje'i pha rol du phyin pa'o/ /
576.20(1): sa bdag rnams shes shing rtogs nas pha rol phyin bcu rtogs nas sangs rgyas so/ /
576.21(1): snying rje bsked pa'i le'u bco brgyad pa'o// //
577.1(1): 7 ston pas bka' stsal pa/ khri gtsug la sogs sa bdag rnams nyon cig /smon 
577.2(1): lam gyi pha rol du phyin pa bshad par bya'o/ /sa bdag rnams kyis zhus pa'i/ smon 
577.3(1): lam gyi pha rol du phyin pa'i rgyu rkyen gang lags/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ rgyu dang 
577.4(1): gzugs dang rga shi la sogs 'khor ba'i rgyu rkyen gyi gzugs yod/ 'bras bu ni pha 
577.5(1): rol phyin bcu'o/ /sa bdag gis zhus pa/ smon lam gyi rgyu 'bras ci ltar bsgrub/
577.6(1): gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams gzugs nas rga shi la sogs chu 
577.7(1): zla ltar shes nas smon lam gyi thob pa'o/ /gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag 
577.8(1): gsung rab 'bum sde 'di/ dus mtha' 'gro don rgyas par shog /bsam dgu 'grub 
577.9(1): par gyur cig /sdig dgu zhi bar gyur cig /smon lam gyi le'u ste bcu dgu pa'o// //
577.10(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ thabs kyi pha rol du phyin pa 'di bshad nas 
577.11(1): sa bdag rnams nyon cig /sa bdag rnams kyis zhus pa/ thabs kyi pha rol du phyin 
577.12(1): pa 'bras bu gang lags/ gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ gzugs sam gzugs su 
577.13(1): mi snang na/ thabs kyi pha rol du phyin pa'o/ /de dang gnyis su med pa nas thabs kyi 
577.14(1): pha rol du phyin pa'o/ /'bras bu'o/ /gzugs dang skye mched dang rkyen tshor dang rga shi 
577.15(1): la sogs thabs kyi phyin pa'o/ /de gnyis su med na thabs kyi 'bras bu'o/ /sa bdag 
577.16(1): rnams kyis zhus pa/ thabs kyi rnams bsgrub tu yod dam med dam/ ston pas 
577.17(1): bka' stsal pa/ rgyu 'bras bu gdeng dang ldan pa/ nas bsgrub cing bya'o/ /mi dang lha 
577.18(1): dang gang rung ba 'bum nag 'di bris klog /bkur bsti gang byed pa de/ sa bdag 
577.19(1): rgyal po rgyal mo blon po dang / dmag mi rnams bdag la srung skyabs mdzad du 
577.20(1): gsol/ bsam dgu 'grub par gyur cig /'dod dgu 'phel bar gyur cig /thabs 
577.21(1): kyi le'u ste nyi shu pa'o// //
578.1(1): 7de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/  shes rab kyi pha rol tu phyin pa 'dir bshad 
578.2(1): nas/ sa bdag rnams 'di la nyon cig /de nas sa bdag khri gtsug rgyal bas zhus 
578.3(1): pa/ shes rab ci ltar spyod/ ci ltar phyin/ 'bras bu gang lags/ ston pas bka' 
578.4(1): stsal pa/ shes rab kyi pha rol tu phyin pa ni thams cad rtse mo'o/ /thams cad mchog 
578.5(1): go /thams cad yum mo/ thams cad pha rol du phyin no/ /shes rab spyod par 'dod 
578.6(1): na/ gzugs dang rga shi la sogs 'khor ba'i bon rnams mi dmigs pa shes par 
578.7(1): bya'o/ /sbyin pa dang 'bras bu la sogs mya ngan la 'das pa'i bon rnams shes par

578.16(1): pa'i mi rnams la/ bsam dgu 'grub par gyur cig /'dod dgu 'phel bar gyur

578.20(1): nyi shu gcig pa'o// //
578.21(1): 7 de nas gshen rab kyis bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag blon rnams nyon cig /bon 
579.1(1): thams cad ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag gtsang kun gyis zhus pa/ bon 
579.2(1): thams cad stong ci ltar lags/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ gzugs stong pa nyid 
579.3(1): dang / stong pa nyid la gzugs med do/ /de bzhin du tshor ba dang / 'du shes dang /

579.12(1): byed cing bsam pa 'grub bo/ /stong pa nyid kyi le'u ste nyi shu gnyis pa'o// //
579.13(1): 7 de nas gtsun nam gyis ston pa la rin po che sna tshogs phul nas/ 'khor

582.1(1): dang / rgyud ldan bla ma dam pa dang / sa bdag klu gnyan gtod 'khor dang / snang

582.3(1): mchod pa'i le'u ste nyer drug pa'o// //
582.4(1): 7 yang sa bdag gser thub rgyal bas zhus/ kye ston pa'i thugs rje nyi ma 
582.5(1): 'dra/ 'gro ba 'dren mdzad kun gyi mchog /gshen rab sku la phyag 'tshal lo/ /sa 
582.6(1): bdag 'bum nag bya ba de gang lags/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ gser thub nyon 
582.7(1): cig /gsung rab 'di bon thams cad gcig tu 'dus pas/ sa bdag 'bum nag 
582.8(1): mtshan btags pa/ 'di ltar ro/ /bon gyi sgo mo brgyad khri bzhi stong yang / ma bcos 
582.9(1): pa'i thig le gcig la 'dus so/ /'bum zhes bya ba ni sa bdag gi 'bum/ rgyu dang

582.11(1): 7

582.13(1): mang ba ci lags/ ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams nyon cig lo rgyus dang 
582.14(1): bca' thabs 'bum sde dag kyang sems can blo dang sbyar ba'o/ /bdag kong tse sa 
582.15(1): bdag gi gshen po khyod/ 'gro ba rigs drug la sogs sems can blo dang ldan pa'i/
582.16(1): las 'phro bzang po yod pa rnams kyi don rtogs so/ /blo dman las 'phro zhan pa

582.20(1): le'u ste nyer bdun pa'o//
582.21(1): 7 de nas ston pas bka' stsal pa/ sa bdag rnams ngo bcug med pa gzha' 
582.22(1): tshon 'dra/ gza' gtad med pa glog dang 'dra/ shes shing rtogs na bdag med

594.12(1): pa btsug ste/ gna' dpe 'tshol bsdu/ gtsang bshus gtan 'beb/ dag zhus las rim 
594.13(1): sogs la 'jug ste/ bka' dang bka' brten gsung 'bum bcas glegs bam brgya phrag 
594.14(1): du ma gsal dag khams gtsang spus tshad ldan pa dpar skrun 'grems spel dang / bon 
594.15(1): sbyin kyang 'bor chen byas nas g.yung drung bon gyi bstan pa dar spel thad grub 'bras 
594.16(1): 'bur du thon pa'i sri zhu bsgrubs yod la/ rgyal phyi nang du bzhugs pa'i bla ma dge bshes 
594.17(1): dad ldan skya ser du mas bsngags brjod kyi me tog kyang mang du 'thor song bas nged 
594.18(1): tsho'i ngos nas kyang da res las don chen po 'grub pa'i gdeng spobs dang dad gus lhag 
594.19(1): bsam bcas sngar las lhag par 'phel song / rig pa'i gnas dang bstan pa'i bon 
594.20(1): gyis phyug pa'i phyi mo g.yung drung bon gyi gzhung lugs la grub mtha' 'dzin pa mi chen bla 
594.21(1): chen 'gas gcig rjes gnyis 'jug gis bsam bzhin du brda chad khag log 'grel 
594.22(1): byas te rjes 'dzin rnams mgo rmongs su bcug pa mthong / 'di dag ni rgyal khab dang mi 
595.1(1): rigs/  chos lugs bcas gang la yang mthun sgril dang bde skyid kyi bkag rdo ru 'gyur 
595.2(1): gshis/ 'dir bon gyi gzhung lugs ngo ma shes 'dod na bon gyi gsung rab dpe cha 'di 
595.3(1): lta bu la blta klog dang zhib 'jug gnang re'i ched dang / g.yung drung bon gyi bla sprul 
595.4(1): mkhas dbang mang pos yun ring re bskul byas pa'i rkyen dang / rgya che'i bod yig klog 
595.5(1): pa po yongs la blta bde 'khyer sla'i cha rkyen du dmigs nas/ ston pa'i gsung rab lung 
595.6(1): gi bon rin po che'i skor deb phreng brgya dang lnga bcu can zhig yig dkar gyi lam nas 
595.7(1): legs bsgrigs byas te/ rje smra seng bla ma'i gsung gi byin rlabs las 'phos pa/ g.yung 
595.8(1): drung bon gyi rgyud gzhung rin po che'i khrod kyi thun mong min pa'i brda chad/[ <<]gsung rab 
595.9(1): sgo mdzod rin po che'i glegs bam[>>]zhes pa dpe tshogs spyi chings kyi mtshan du gsol nas 
595.10(1): dpar 'grems zhus pa yin/
595.11(1): zhus dag thad las rim dngos la thog ma'i ma dpe gang la byas pa/ bar du dpe cha 
595.12(1): gang du bsdur ba/ bsdur ba'i legs cha gang zhig thon pa sogs glegs bam so so'i nang 
595.13(1): dang mjug gi zhus bsgrigs gsal bshad du bris yod/ mdor na nged las mi yongs 
595.14(1): kyis spyi lo 2011lo nas bzung mi lo lnga yi ring dad pa dag snang dang rang gi dge sbyor 
595.15(1): dang bstan la zhabs phyi gtso bzung thog deb rer tshar grangs bco lnga nas nyi shu bar 
595.16(1): zhus dag byas yod pas sngar las lhag pa'i legs cha zhig thon yod pa'i re ba yod/ 'on 
595.17(1): kyang re 'ga' ma dpe gcig ma gtogs bsdur ya ma rnyed pa dang / re 'ga' bsdur ya 
595.18(1): du ma rnyed kyang bris pa'i chad lhag sogs kyis gcig mtshungs med pa dang / nged zhus 
595.19(1): sgrig pa tsho'i mkhyen dpyod tshad brgal can min pa bcas dang rjes 'gro byas pas nor 
595.20(1): 'khrul gyis bslad pa'ang yod nges pas/ rjes gzigs mkhan rnam pas su dang gang la 
595.21(1): khag dkri med pa rang bstan rang skyong gi 'gan 'khri gtsang ma phrag tu khur ste bstan pa 
595.22(1): rin po che'i ched du nor 'khrul yo bsrang dag ther gnang ba'i skul ma zhu rgyu dang /
596.1(1): mthar don du nged [<<]g.yung drung bon gyi bka' brten dpe rnying phyogs bsgrigs khang [>>]
596.2(1): gis las don rlabs chen 'di 'dra zhig legs grub byung ba ni/ rig gzhung 'di dang 
596.3(1): bstan pa 'di la lhag bsam can gyis phyar gru mnyam 'degs byas pa las byung ba 
596.4(1): yin/ kan su'u mi rigs dpe skrun khang gi dbu khrid 'brug rgyal mkhar dang gcod pa 
596.5(1): rnam gnyis nas thugs khur rgyab skyor tshad med gnang ba dang / lhag par du dus rab 
596.6(1): kyi gnyan 'phrang mang po'i nang tshe srog 'ben dang bsdos te srung skyong byas pa'i dpe cha 
596.7(1): g.yar ba'i dpe bdag rnam pa dang / de bzhin nga tsho'i bstan don gyi bya ba kun la 
596.8(1): mthun sbyor gnang ba ma tshad dpe tshogs 'di dpar skrun skabs su yang ma bskul dang 
596.9(1): blang gis zhal 'debs gnang mkhan bcas dngos shugs brgyud gsum nas rgyu tshegs 
596.10(1): thabs gsum gyis sdong grogs rogs ram gnang mkhan yongs la snying dbus nas 
596.11(1): thugs rje che zhu rgyu dang / gsung rab dag bzhengs byas pa'i dge ba'i tshogs 'dis/
596.12(1): 7 skyabs rje rgyal ba sman ri ba'i mkhan slob rnam gnyis gtsos ris su ma chad pa'i 
596.13(1): bstan 'dzin skyes chen dam pa rnams kyi sku tshe bskal brgyar brtan zhing bzhed dgongs 
596.14(1): lhun gyis 'grub pa dang / 'brel thogs kyi sbyin pa'i bdag po dang las gzhi 'di'i byed 
596.15(1): po kun tshe bsod dbang khams gong nas gong du mtho ste myur du sku gsum rdzogs pa'i 
596.16(1): sangs rgyas kyi go 'phang thob pa dang / zhang bod rig gzhung rnams mi nyams gong nas 
596.17(1): gong du 'phel te 'dzam gling tha gru yongs kyi snod bcud rgud pa gso zhing phan bde'i 
596.18(1): gsos su khyab pa dang / yangs pa'i rgyal khams kun du nad mug 'khrug rtsod dang rang 
596.19(1): byung 'byung ba'i 'jigs pa rnams rmeng med du zhi nas bde legs phun tshogs skyid kyi nyi
